programme.title: Bloomberg Surveillance
programme.desc: Jonathan, Lisa and Annmarie survey the economy and global markets with daily conversations with leaders and decision makers, from Wall Street to Washington and beyond, to cover the latest in business, investment and geopolitics.

programme.title: Bloomberg Open Interest
programme.desc: Delivering the market-moving news anyone needs to know to get a jump start on the U.S. trading day.

programme.title: Bloomberg Tech
programme.desc: Bloomberg Tech is the only daily live technology program with a focus on breaking news, market-moving reporting and analysis of global technology companies and stories. The program brings the audience interviews from the biggest names in the business...

programme.title: Bloomberg The Asia Trade
programme.desc: Bringing global investors everything you need to know as the trading day begins in Asia. Bloomberg TV is live from Tokyo and Sydney with Shery Ahn and Haidi Stroud-Watts, getting insight and analysis from newsmakers and industry leaders.

programme.title: Bloomberg: The China Show
programme.desc: From politics and policy to tech and trends, Yvonne Man and David Ingles give global investors insight into the world's second-biggest economy, delivering in-depth discussions with newsmakers.

programme.title: Insight With Haslinda Amin
programme.desc: The definitive guide for global news audiences to get the complete picture on the story of the day, through probing interviews and nuanced conversations.

programme.title: Bloomberg Horizons Middle East & Africa
programme.desc: A spotlight on the fast paced growth and major deals happening across the Middle East and Africa, linking the market drivers from overnight in the U.S. and across Asia into the region's trading day, with deep-dive analysis of the top businesses.

programme.title: Bloomberg Daybreak: Europe
programme.desc: From London, essential morning viewing to stay ahead of the day's market trends with news stories from the U.S. and Asia in the lead-up to the opening of European markets.

programme.title: Bloomberg The Opening Trade
programme.desc: "The Opening Trade" explores things to know as markets open across Europe; analysis that isn't available anywhere else, a break-down of the biggest stories of the day and top guests who have skin in the game.

programme.title: The Pulse with Francine Lacqua
programme.desc: Based in London, Francine Lacqua speaks with guests about global business, economics, finance and politics.

programme.title: Bloomberg Brief
programme.desc: "Bloomberg Brief" delivers the market news, data and analysis viewers need to set their agendas.

programme.title: Bloomberg Surveillance
programme.desc: Jonathan, Lisa and Annmarie survey the economy and global markets with daily conversations with leaders and decision makers, from Wall Street to Washington and beyond, to cover the latest in business, investment and geopolitics.

programme.title: Life & Legend of Wyatt Earp
programme.desc: no info available

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp
programme.desc: The Muleskinner : Earp's old friend Sam McGuffin stops in Dodge City with a load of freight and his six mules.

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp
programme.desc: Earp Ain't Even Wearing Guns : Earp is goaded by a southern lady into hanging up his guns while her father's Texas crew is in Dodge City. He and Shotgun are forced to resort to their fists to control the outfit.

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp
programme.desc: Bat Jumps the Reservation : Bat Masterson returns to Dodge City after a good streak of gambling with Cora Warrous and her brother.

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp
programme.desc: The Trail to Tombstone : As Wyatt and his group enter Arizona they are stopped by a representative of Wells Fargo.

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp
programme.desc: Tombstone : Earp decides to ride into Tombstone alone and unarmed to see for himself how bad it is. He finds himself caught in the midst of an ongoing dispute between the miners and Clantons.

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp
programme.desc: Wyatt's Decision : Earp decides to leave Tombstone but learns the Clantons are gunning for him. Nellie Cashman and Dick Gird want Earp to stay to bring law and order to Tombstone.

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp
programme.desc: Lineup for Battle : When a man rides into Tombstone with three bullets in him, Earp decides to go alone to arrest Old Man Clanton for stealing the man's horses.

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp
programme.desc: The Nugget and the Epitaph : Earp soon learns that the Tombstone newspaper The Nugget is run by a crooked editor who is in league with the gangs running Arizona including the Clantons.

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp
programme.desc: The Perfidy of Shotgun Gibbs : Earp requests his old deputy to join him in Tombstone. On the way there, Shotgun is asked by the Clanton gang to vote ten times in the Tombstone election for the judge.

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp
programme.desc: You Can't Fight City Hall : Earp's crackdown on crime in Tombstone is causing big problems for the Clanton gang.

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp
programme.desc: Behan Shows His Hand : Clum and others want Earp to take a posse after the men he was forced to release threaten him, but Earp declines.

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp
programme.desc: The Ring of Death : Fed up with Earp's interference, the head of the 10 Percent Ring in Tucson decides to kill Earp.

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp
programme.desc: Wyatt Wins One : Earp is summoned to Fort Huachuca where he is told Old Man Clanton has put a claim in for $7000 of beef stolen by the Apaches.

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp
programme.desc: The Fugitive : Earp arrests the son of a Mexican for murder before he crosses the border. Earp must get his prisoner back to Tombstone but a posse sent by Behan is after the same man.

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp
programme.desc: The Noble Outlaws : Earp's friend Ned Buntline comes to Tombstone hoping Earp will introduce him to the Clantons so he can use them in a new book.

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp
programme.desc: The Paymaster : Major Fletcher asks Earp to help transport a $15,000 payroll to the Army fort by way of a stagecoach with an interesting set of passengers.

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp
programme.desc: The Clayton's Family Row : The heat is on Earp from everyone when Curly Bill Brocius and Johnny Ringo threaten to shoot it out in Tombstone over a dead horse.

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp
programme.desc: The Matchmaker : Shotgun Gibbs decides that Earp and Nellie Cashman are made for each other and should get married. He sets up a dinner between them which in turn fuels rumors that reach the Clanton boys.

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp
programme.desc: Get Shotgun Gibbs : The Ten Percent Ring wants retribution for the killing of Priddy.

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp
programme.desc: Wells Fargo Calling Marshal Earp : Wells Fargo asks Earp to help them solve the problem of silver ingots being stolen due to constant thefts on a 30-mile run.

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp
programme.desc: A Murderer's Return : Convict Dobie Jenner arrives in Tombstone after being released from Yuma prison for murder. When his old mining partner George McKean sees him in town, he tells Earp to run Jenner out of town

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp
programme.desc: The Big Fight at Total Wreck : Dick Gird has hired Irish and Welsh miners to work at the Total Wreck mine but the old country feud between the two nationalities creates constant fights.

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp
programme.desc: Frontier Surgeon : During the holdup of a stage, gang leader Tinkham Brown is wounded. Earp wants Doc Goodfellow to tell Earp if the outlaws come after him but Doc Goodfellow refuses.

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp
programme.desc: Dodge City: Hail and Farewell : As Earp prepares to leave Dodge City, Mayor Kelley and Judge Tobin want a send off celebration but he doesn't want one for fear of a disturbance.

programme.title: FBI Files
programme.desc: no info available

programme.title: The FBI Files
programme.desc: .22 Caliber Killer : In Buffalo, New York, a sniper targeted African-American men. He held a city hostage, and threatened to ignite a racial powder keg. And it looked like others might be following his bloody example.

programme.title: The FBI Files
programme.desc: A Family Torn : The parents of 11 yr. old Brittany Martinez knew their daughter was no runaway. Something had happened to her, something terrible. When they failed to find Brittany in their quiet Illinois neighborhood, they called the police.

programme.title: The FBI Files
programme.desc: Terror In Disguise : Banks use a variety of devices to discourage would-be robbers security cameras, silent alarms, and exploding dye packs. But when an elusive bank robber targeted Seattle's banks, none of these precautions were effective.

programme.title: The FBI Files
programme.desc: No Remorse : A burning body in a dark alley shed light on a cold-blooded killer. His partners in crime would tell the story, if they lived. In the underworld of the drug trade, even a childhood friend can quickly become an enemy.

programme.title: The FBI Files
programme.desc: Radical Agenda : In the 1970's a string of bank robberies and bombings spread fear and destruction along the east coast. The FBI faced a new breed of criminal, the domestic terrorist.

programme.title: The FBI Files
programme.desc: Unlawful Flight : In Alabama, two desperate criminals fled the custody of a local deputy. Eluding authorities, they made their way across the country in a wave of car theft, abduction, and murder.

programme.title: The FBI Files
programme.desc: Brothers Betrayed : In the 70s and 80s a gang of thugs wreaked havoc on the island of Puerto Rico. Organized, experienced and deadly they seemed beyond the reach of the law.

programme.title: The FBI Files
programme.desc: The Search For Lisa Rene : When a young woman was grabbed from her Texas home, the police raced to find her abductors. On the face of it, the kidnapping seemed like the random act of desperate men.

programme.title: The FBI Files
programme.desc: Hunter's Target : Over a thousand hunting accidents are reported in the United States each year. Fewer than ten percent of them are fatal. But when one hunter's death seemed suspicious, the FBI was called in to investigate.

programme.title: The FBI Files
programme.desc: Final Takedown : The United States is one of the most profitable drug markets in the world. For ruthless and sophisticated drug traffickers, it is truly the land of opportunity.

programme.title: The FBI Files
programme.desc: Dark Woods : While camping with her family in Montana, a seven-year-old girl was abducted from her tent. No one in the campground witnessed the crime and the kidnapper left no clues.

programme.title: The FBI Files
programme.desc: Deadly Secrets : Two young boys were the only witnesses to their mother's murder. The horrible crime appeared unmotivated, senseless and random.

programme.title: The FBI Files
programme.desc: Deadly Heist : In Arizona, an armored van loaded with cash failed to reach its destination. Authorities suspected an inside job. When the vehicle was recovered with the drivers and the cash missing, those suspicions grew even more.

programme.title: The FBI Files
programme.desc: Global Pursuit : In Langley, Virginia, a terrorist fired into rush hour traffic. The victims seemed randomly selected, but the motive appeared to be political, targeting employees of the Central Intelligence Agency.

programme.title: The FBI Files
programme.desc: First and Kennedy Street Crew : In the early 1990's, Washington, D.C., became the murder capital of the nation. Few were left untouched by gang violence, which was ignited by the drug trade. By 1994, that violence would strike at the very heart of law enforcement.

programme.title: The FBI Files
programme.desc: Hired Gun : When three people were found murdered in their home, it appeared like a burglary gone awry. But a crime this horrific deserved a closer look.

programme.title: The FBI Files
programme.desc: Death Pact : The average bank robbery yields roughly 3,000 dollars. Yet some criminals risk everything for the take. In suburban Chicago, a disguised gunman began a series of robberies, growing more violent with each one.

programme.title: The FBI Files
programme.desc: Above the Law : California Highway Patrolman George Gwaltney discovered the body of 23-year-old Robin Bishop near her car on a remote desert highway.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: no info available

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Price of Murder : Using science as their most powerful weapon, investigators must find these hired killers and make them pay the true price of murder.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Face Of Tragedy : Forensic Sculpting: Forensic sculptors retrieve people from oblivion. Using clay and an intricate knowledge of anatomy, forensic arts place a face on an unidentified skull, recreating the victim's likeness, which often leads to his name.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Scent Of The Kill : A dog can be a dead man's best friend. Dogs have been trained to sniff out corpses, drugs, explosives, and missing persons. They're often the first to find the essential clue that sets an investigation in motion.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Crimes Of Passion : When killers are driven by jealousy and desire, their desperation is evident in both the crime and their efforts to avoid detection. But forensic science can reveal even the slightest mistake to solve crimes of passion.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Cold Blooded : Time of death is an important consideration in a murder investigation, but when a killer freezes, burns, or grinds his victim, even the most skilled medical examiner would be at a loss about how to calculate it.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Fateful Twist : A southeastern Virginia community is stunned by a crime no one can believe. A pregnant woman murdered, her baby lost. Across the state, another town feels a similar shock, a brutal, random slaying in a most unexpected setting.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Dead Men Do Talk : Profiles the work of world-renowned forensic experts and the procedures they use to solve murders and other mysteries in minutes or centuries after they happen.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Tainted Blood : The forces of nature can reduce a body to bones in a matter of weeks. Using a unique combination of art and science, forensic anthropologists give victims a face long after they have been forgotten.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Double Helix : DNA Analysis: With the advent of DNA analysis, just a few microscopic cells found at a crime scene can be used to put a murder behind bars.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Crimes Of Passion : When killers are driven by jealousy and desire, their desperation is evident in both the crime and their efforts to avoid detection. But forensic science can reveal even the slightest mistake to solve crimes of passion.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Fatal Abduction : Anytime, anywhere, people disappear, kidnapped from their daily routines. Predators always leave clues behind, but chasing them takes time, hampering investigators' attempts to solve these fatal abductions.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Predators And Parasites : For the forensic entomologist, the insects that nest in dead bodies are like tiny witnesses to a crime.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Texas Rangers : Formed in the 1830s to protect settlers against Indian attack, the Rangers became part of the Texas Highway Patrol in 1935. Their role has continued to evolve to keep up with changing times; today it includes sophisticated forensics labs.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: False Witness : When a murder is committed and deceit clouds the evidence, investigators turn to science and technology to uncover the truth and expose a murderous lie and capture the killer.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Signed In Blood : Handwriting Analysis: We've all heard that our handwriting tells more about our personalities than we think. Are we risk-takers, have low-esteem, fun loving, or are we capable of murder?

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: A Federal Offense : When there's a difficult case to crack whether it involves drugs, arson, or weapons the investigators and scientists of the Bureau of Alcohol, Tobacco and Firearms have the means to crack it.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Out Of The Grave : New Forensic Techniques used to Solve Old Cases: Advancement in science and technology are encouraging people to revisit the past in hopes of answering questions that have remained unanswered, and solving crimes that seemed unsolvable.

programme.title: The New Detectives

programme.title: The Cisco Kid

programme.title: The Rifleman

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Bloodlines : After Lucas kills a mountain man in a brawl, his father arrives in North Fork to break his other boys out of jail and take revenge on Lucas and Marshall Torrance.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: The Blowout : Newly arrived gunslinger Al Walker throws a mammoth party at the saloon, keeping acting Marshall Ben Waller busy until Lucas is forced to intervene.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Obituary : After Lucas accuses a newspaper writer's misleading articles of causing an innocent man's death, the writer begins writing articles about Lucas.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Tension : Gavin and Ezra Martin think that Lucas killed their son Clemmie while taking part in a train robbery and Lucas refuses to tell them what really happened.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Eddie's Daughter : Eddie's daughter causes trouble for Lucas when two strangers threaten her life after she arrives with criminal information and stolen money.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Panic : Town character Brett Conway blackmails Lucas with the knowledge that a young couple Lucas rescued is suffering from yellow fever.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Ordeal : Lucas and Mark are stranded in the middle of a desert with very little food or water, and after Lucas is injured, Mark becomes the only hope for their survival.

programme.title: The Rifleman

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Letter of the Law : Lucas makes a life-or-death decision when Micah is held hostage and the kidnappers demand the release of a notorious outlaw.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Legacy : Lucas tries to do a good deed for the old town drunk but it backfires when the drunk's son believes he inherited Lucas' ranch.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: The Baby Sitter : A dance hall singer asks Lucas to care for her daughter in an effort to hide the baby from her self-righteous, bigoted father.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: The Coward : Lucas becomes involved in a battle between an aspiring writer and a cocky, bragging trail boss.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Surveyors : Mark runs away from home after his father questions his story about overhearing a plot to rob the bank.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Day of the Hunter : A famous buffalo hunter tries to goad Lucas into a shooting match. When Lucas refuses, he becomes the new target.

programme.title: The Rifleman

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: A Case of Identity : Mark finds himself in grave danger when two unscrupulous detectives searching for a man's long-lost son claim that it's Mark.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: The Visitor : Lucas is drawn to a young widow passing through town on her way to claim an inheritance but others who covet it are trying to kill her.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Hero : After a young stablehand kills a notorious gunslinger, he is baffled by the hostility of the townspeople about giving him the reward.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: The Horse Traders : When a horse dealer transporting a prize stallion stops in North Fork, two saddle tramps try to use trickery to obtain it.

programme.title: The Rifleman

programme.desc: Heller : After foiling a girl's attempt to rob the general store, Lucas finds that she and her brother are plotting the murder of their abusive stepfather.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: The Grasshopper : A condemned killer being transported by train murders a marshal and takes Mark hostage.

programme.desc: no info available

programme.title: Bubble Guppies
programme.desc: Ducks in a Row : Learn about different musical instruments as you join the Bubble Guppies' marching band, and help Nonny figure out how to lead the band when there's a duck in the way!

programme.title: Bubble Guppies
programme.desc: The Moon Rocks! : Blast off with the Bubble Guppies – it’s time to learn all about the solar system! Help them begin to learn about outer space in this far-out episode.

programme.title: Bubble Guppies
programme.desc: Gup, Gup and Away! : Pack a suitcase and hurry to the airport! Help the Bubble Guppies fly an airplane through the sky and over the clouds - just be sure to keep an eye out for airplane pirates!

programme.title: Bubble Guppies
programme.desc: Check it Out! : Uh oh Gil lost his library card while returning his favorite books to library! Gil and his Guppy friends will have to dive into all of Gils favorite books to find it again.

programme.title: Bubble Guppies
programme.desc: Good Hair Day! : Whoa! Gils hair grew really long! He had better get it cut soon, because today is Picture Day, and he really wants to look his best.

programme.title: Bubble Guppies
programme.desc: The Puppy and the Ring! Part 1 : In the mythical land of Bubbledom, the evil Night Wizard has taken the magical Ring of the Sun! Someone needs to save the daytime! Will Molly and Gil return the Ring to the Sun King, or will it be nighttime in Bubbledom forever?

programme.title: Bubble Guppies
programme.desc: The Puppy and the Ring! Part 2 : In the mythical land of Bubbledom, the evil Night Wizard has taken the magical Ring of the Sun! Someone needs to save the daytime! Will Molly and Gil return the Ring to the Sun King, or will it be nighttime in Bubbledom forever?

programme.title: Bubble Guppies
programme.desc: Good Morning, Mr. Grumpfish! : The Bubble Guppies have a substitute teacher: Mr. Grumpfish. He doesn’t seem to like anything! It’ll take a lot for the kids to convince Mr. Grumpfish that their favorite things are worth singing about!

programme.title: Bubble Guppies
programme.desc: Get Ready for School! : Oona's worried about her little friend Avi! It's his first day of school and he's nervous. From cubbies to free play, the Guppies show us the ropes and teach us that school is a great place to learn, play, and meet new friends.

programme.title: Bubble Guppies
programme.desc: The Police Cop-etition! : Stop, in the name of fun! Officer Miranda teaches Gil and the other kids how police officers use laws to keep us safe. Can the Guppies use what they’ve learned to earn their badges as honorary junior police officers?

programme.title: Bubble Guppies
programme.desc: The Elephant Trunk-A-Dunk! : Gil's looking for elephants! He loves them all—African and Asian. He's in for a treat when the Guppies fill the stands for the Trunk-A-Dunk, a basketball game played by pachyderms!

programme.title: Bubble Guppies
programme.desc: The Super Ballet Bowl! : Jump! Leap! Relevé! Bubbletucky sports fans love ballet! Molly and the rest of the Guppies want to learn how to tell a story through dance. It’ll take practice, but they'll give ballet a new spin in the Super Ballet Bowl!

programme.title: Bubble Guppies
programme.desc: The Wizard of Oz-tralia! : After Molly and Gil meet Bobby, a nature show host from Australia, they can't wait to learn all about Australian animals. From marsupials to the amazing platypus, the Guppies can't get enough of the creatures Down Under!

programme.title: Bubble Guppies
programme.desc: The Arctic Life! : Brrrr! The Arctic sure is cold—probably because it’s filled with so many cool animals! After meeting Arctic Dan, Gil embarks on an icy expedition. With the Guppies’ help, can Gil brave the elements to reach the North Pole?

programme.title: Bubble Guppies
programme.desc: Puppy Love! : Bubble Puppy’s got a cold! While Dr. Martin, the veterinarian, takes good care of him, the kids spend the day thinking about dogs—a Guppy’s best friend. But will Gil’s get-well card will help Bubble Puppy feel better?

programme.title: Bubble Guppies
programme.desc: The Oyster Bunny! : It’s time for baby animals! Goby dreams up the Oyster Bunny, a mysterious character who loves baby animals. Can the Guppies follow an egg trail to find the elusive Oyster Bunny? A tasty treat awaits them!

programme.title: Bubble Guppies
programme.desc: The Amusement Parking Lot! : Beep beep! The Guppies love cars! But when Mr. Grouper’s car breaks down on the way to an amusement park, will the kids figure out how to get this field trip rolling again?

programme.title: Bubble Guppies
programme.desc: Party at Sea! : Anchor’s away! It’s time to celebrate boats with a party at sea! But when a giant ball of snow cone ice threatens to sink the party ship, can the Guppies use their nautical knowledge to save the day—and the party?

programme.title: Bubble Guppies
programme.desc: The Unidentified Flying Orchestra! : Strings! Brass! Woodwinds! Percussion! After Gil and Molly meet a conductor, the Guppies want to join an orchestra. Led by a conductor from another planet, the Guppies’ orchestra will make music that’s out of this world!

programme.title: Bubble Guppies
programme.desc: Come to Your Senses! : Oh no! Nonny broke his glasses! When they’re fixed, Nonny is determined to retrieve them on his own. But to do it, he’ll have to depend on his other four senses to reach the glasses store before it closes!

programme.title: Bubble Guppies
programme.desc: Puddleball! : When rain spoils a game of kickball, Gil invents a new game that shows how fun a little rain can be. But when the weather turns too wet, even for puddleball, Bubble Puppy must overcome his fear of thunder to save the game!

programme.title: Bubble Guppies
programme.desc: The Bubble Bee-athalon! : Bzzzz! The Guppies are busy living the bees’ life! Turning nectar into honey is tough bzzness. It takes a lot of teamwork every step of the way. Can the kids work together to make honey for the queen bee’s teatime?

programme.title: Bubble Guppies
programme.desc: The Running of the Bullfrogs! : Ribbit! Gil and Goby bring a tadpole named Fernando to school to watch him grow into a frog. When Fernando’s ready to hop, Gil and Goby will have to lead him back to his pond in the traditional Running of the Bullfrogs!

programme.title: Bubble Guppies
programme.desc: Bubble Scrubbies! : It seems like everyone in Bubbletucky is coming down with a cold-even Mr. Grouper! No need to worry; in their very own "soap opera," the Guppies will use their good hygiene to show Mr. Grouper how to get better!

programme.title: Bubble Guppies
programme.desc: A Very Guppy Christmas! : When Mr. Grouper’s van gets stuck in the holiday snow, Mr. Claws and his horse Snowflake come to the rescue! With snow falling and bells jingling, the Guppies will experience their first sleigh ride!

programme.title: Bubble Guppies
programme.desc: Fruit Camp! : The Guppies love fruits and vegetables, but Deema doesn’t want to try broccoli! When the Guppies face their scout troop initiation, Deema will have to turn over a new leaf if she wants to earn her broccoli badge.

programme.title: Bubble Guppies
programme.desc: Bubble Kitty! : Molly and Gil find a lost kitten named Bubble Kitty, and the Guppies learn that house cats are related to big cats. When Bubble Kitty's owner calls, the kids take Bubble Kitty home to Meownt Rushmore, a rocky tribute to cats!

programme.title: Bubble Guppies
programme.desc: Gobble Gobble Guppies! : Fall is here! Molly and Gil can’t wait to pick pumpkins, but when they lead everyone to the pumpkin patch, the pumpkins are gone! Their turkey friend Giblet leads them on a hunt to find the culprits: the pumpkin patch pirates!

programme.title: Bubble Guppies
programme.desc: Swimtastic Check-Up! : Molly and Oona run into the Mayor training for Bubbletucky’s annual marathon! But when she gets a tummyache, she’ll go to the hospital to get checked out.

programme.title: Bubble Guppies
programme.desc: A Dolphin is a Guppy's Best Friend! : Molly and Gil meet Buddy, a baby dolphin with the friendliest face in the sea! Today is Buddy’s first birthday, and his pod is throwing him a surprise birthday party! Can the Guppies lead Buddy to the party?

programme.title: Bubble Guppies
programme.desc: Super Guppies! : When Molly and Gil bring a comic book to school, all the Guppies want to be superheroes! Molly and Gil dive into the adventure as Guppy Girl and Bubble Boy, but can our heroes stop the smelly villain Sid Fishious?

programme.title: Bubble Guppies
programme.desc: The New Doghouse! : When an accident destroys Bubble Puppy’s doghouse, the Guppies team up with the entire neighborhood to build Bubble Puppy’s dream home - the most tricked out doghouse Bubbletucky has ever seen!

programme.title: Bubble Guppies
programme.desc: The Glitter Games! : Learn all about manners with the Guppies, as Molly helps aspiring princess Demanda get polite in time for the Glitter Games! Will they become true princesses together?

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Cheerio Cheers : With much trepidation, Diane decides to leave Cheers and travel to Europe with Frasier, who has been offered a temporary position at the University of Bologna.

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: The Bartender's Tale : Carla hires an Englishwoman to fill Diane's place while she's in Europe.

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Bells Of St. Clete's : Carla takes revenge on her despised former high school principal.

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Second Time Around : Sam flips when Frasier wants to marry the first girl he dates after Lilith.

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Peterson Principle : Norm gets a tip at work that could guarantee his promotion over the competition.

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Dark Imaginings : Sam suffers a hernia while trying to prove that he's not getting too old.

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Save The Last Dance For Me : Carla turns to Sam as a partner to go up against Nick and Loretta in a dance competition.

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Fear Is My Co-Pilot : Sam and Diane reveal their true feelings for each other while on the verge of death.

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Diane Chambers Day : Frasier plans a pick-me-up party for Diane, but she thinks it was Sam's idea.

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Relief Bartender : Woody feels replaceable when an entertaining bartender overshadows him.

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Strange Bedfellows (Part 1) : Sam expresses interest in politics when he falls for a woman running for city council.

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Strange Bedfellows (Part 2) : Diane quits when she finds out Sam's girlfriend wants her fired.

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Strange Bedfellows (Part 3) : Diane tries to make Sam's life miserable for pushing her out the door.

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: The Proposal : It is revealed that it was Diane to whom Sam proposed on the telephone in the last episode.

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Cape Cad : Sam's date, Vicki, checks out of a country inn to visit her grandmother in the hospital.

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Money Dearest : Cliff fixes his mother, Esther, up with the wealthy Duncan Fitzgerald.

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Abnormal Psychology : Frasier appears on a television show for a debate with Dr. Lilith Stern.

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: House Of Horrors With Formal Dining and Used Brick : Cliff stays the night when Carla gets spooked in her new house.

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Tan N' Wash : Norm is excited about a new business venture, a combination laundromat and tanning salon.

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Young Doctor Weinstein : Sam steals Diane's dinner reservations at a fancy restaurant.

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: The Knights Of Scimitar : Diane tries to make Sam jealous by flirting with one of her students.

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Thanksgiving Orphans : The Cheers gang has a Thanksgiving feast at Carla's new house.

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Everyone Imitates Art : A magazine rejects Diane's poem and accepts Sam's writing instead.

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Book Of Samuel : Woody lies to his hometown girlfriend when she shows up with another guy.

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Dance, Diane, Dance : Diane is fooled into believing that she's a dance star waiting to happen.

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Chambers Vs. Malone : Diane tricks Sam into proposing to her again and she accepts.

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Diamond Sam : Diane throws her engagement ring out the window when she mistakes it for a fake.

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Spellbound : Diane and Carla console Loretta, who has caught Nick cheating on her.

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Never Love A Goalie (Part 1) : Carla falls head over heals for hockey star Eddie LeBec, a newly acquired goalie for the Bruins.

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Never Love A Goalie (Part 2) : Carla realizes she's the reason Eddie's hockey game is suffering.

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: Sauvez Wilzy-X : Les enfants mettent tout en œuvre pour sauver Wilzy-X, une orque du bassin, et pour tenter de réaliser son rêve d'aller sur la lune. Ils ne réalisent pas qu'ils sont victimes d'un canular.

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: Bloody Mary : Le père de Stan est alcoolique. Le petit garçon tente d'aider son père, d'autant que celui-ci est très mal conseillé par les Alcooliques Anonymes.

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: Le Retour de Chef : Chef est de retour à South Park.

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: Gros Caca : Randy est constipé. Il prend alors des laxatifs pour aller déféquer. Après quelques instants de terribles douleurs sur le trône, Randy s'apprête à tirer la chasse mais il remarque que son caca est démesurément grand.

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: Imaginationland Episode 1 : Eric assure avoir aperçu un leprechaun dans la forêt, mais Kyle ne le croit pas. Ils font un pari ensemble : si Cartman prouve l'existence du leprechaun, Kyle devra lui sucer les boules sinon il devra donner 10$ à Kyle.

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: Imaginationland Episode 2 : Les pires créatures ont été libérées par les terroristes et dévastent Imaginationland, où Butters est toujours piégé. Le gouvernement réquisitionne Stan et Kyle afin de trouver un moyen d'entrer à Imaginationland.

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: Imaginationland Episode 3 : Suite à l'accident du portail, Stan est entré dans Imaginationland où Butters est considéré par les créatures imaginaires comme un élu capable de sauver Imaginationland.

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: Guitar Zéro : Stan et Kyle sont accros au jeu Guitar Hero. Mais Stan est meilleur que Kyle, et leur amitié semble s'en dégrader.

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: La Liste : Les filles ont une liste des garçons les plus beaux de la classe. Clyde est premier, mais à sa grande déception Kyle est dernier.

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: Amygdales : Cartman se retrouve à devoir lutter pour sa vie lorsqu'une banale opération des amygdales tourne mal.

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: Le Nouveau Look de Britney : Alors que les garçons aident Britney Spears à atteindre le pôle Nord, ils découvrent le secret qui se cache derrière sa popularité.

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: Planète Gros Nibards : Dans cet hommage de South Park au film de 1981 « Métal Hurlant », les garçons découvrent que ce qui défonce réellement, c'est le pipi de chat.

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: Canada en grève : Lassé d'être ridiculisé, le Canada se met en grève pour avoir plus d'argent et du respect. Cependant, personne ne prend cette grève au sérieux, excepté les enfants.

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: Ciel, une quéquette ! : Madame Garrison tente de trouver un moyen de redevenir l'homme qu'elle aurait toujours dû être. Cartman doit alors la remplacer et s'occuper de la classe.

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: Y'a plus d'Internet : Les habitants de South Park se réveillent et découvrent qu'ils n'ont plus Internet.

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: Un épisode chez les cow-boys : Monsieur Garrison emmène ses élèves en voyage scolaire dans un village de pionniers reconstitué. Alors que Cartman passe la journée avec Butters dans son sillage, des malfaiteurs arrivent dans le parc.

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: Le Problème Chinois : Cartman développe une véritable paranoïa envers les chinois à cause du cauchemar qui hante ses nuits depuis peu : la cérémonie d'ouverture des JO de Pékin.

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: Le Combat : Wendy s'attire des ennuis en menaçant Cartman de le frapper après l'école. Peu importe la rage de Wendy, tous les paris donnent Cartman gagnant.

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: Pandémie : Les enfants remarquent l'incroyable prolifération de musiciens péruviens dans les centres commerciaux.

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: Pandémie 2 - La Terreur : Les enfants et Craig se retrouvent paumés dans la jungle péruvienne. Depuis le renvoi des musiciens péruviens, les États-Unis sont attaqués par des cochons d'Inde géants que Randy filme en pleine panique avec sa nouvelle caméra.

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: À propos d'hier soir : Barack Obama vient de remporter les élections présidentielles face à McCain. Tout le pays est divisé entre les gagnants, dont Randy, qui font la fête ; et les perdants, dont Ike, qui sont persuadés que la fin du monde est proche.

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: Elementary School Musical : Les garçons se rendent compte qu'ils ne sont plus les plus cools de l'école. Stan réalise qu'il pourrait perdre Wendy s'il ne change rien à cette situation !

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: L'Impunissable : Les enfants Goth de l'école élémentaire de South Park ont de la concurrence. Butters est persuadé d'avoir vu un vampire à l'école, mais personne ne l'écoute.

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: La Bague : Kenny emmène sa petite amie à un concert des Jonas Brothers, pensant que celui-ci le mènera à son cœur et à d'autres parties du corps.

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: Le Coon : Persuadé que la ville de South Park a besoin d'un super-héros, Cartman devient, la nuit venue, Le Coon.

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: Margaritaville : Randy annonce qu'il a une solution pour sortir le pays de son désastre économique.

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: Mange, prie et froute : Les enfants sont surexcités car en rentrant chez eux ils verront la suite d'un épisode de Terrence et Phillip.

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: Bite au nez de poisson : Jimmy en veut à Cartman de s'attribuer le mérite d'une blague qu'il a lui-même créée et qui a beaucoup de succès dans tout le pays. Mais Kanye West est très énervé car il n'en comprend pas la chute.

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: Le Derby de Pinewood : Stan participe avec son père Randy à une course de petites voitures en bois, le Derby de Pinewood.

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: Barbobèse : Butters et un petit groupe de recrues rejoignent Cartman dans son rêve de vivre sur l'île du crâne où se trouve un trésor enterré.

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: Vedettes mortes : Des fantômes de célébrités récemment décédées tourmentent Ike. Il est mort de peur et le stress pourrait bien le tuer.

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: La Meilleure Gagneuse de Butters : Butters découvre une activité lucrative après avoir pour la première fois fait payer un baiser. Mais le sergent Yates décide de lutter très activement contre la prostitution.

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: Catch : Cartman, Kyle, Stan et Kenny découvrent leur nouvelle passion dans la vie après être allés à un combat de catch et se dépêchent de signer pour le club de lutte.

programme.title: Lingo
programme.desc: Lingo 1128 : Part word game, part puzzle, two teams compete to see who can figure out the most words for a chance to win $100,000. Each word they guess gives them more clues to the correct answer in this fun guessing game that requires both luck and logic.

programme.title: 1 vs 100
programme.desc: Episode 14 : Carrie Ann Inaba hosts this game where one player ("The One") is pitted against "The Mob" of 100 people, with each trying to correctly answer a series of multiple-choice trivia questions for a potential jackpot of $50,000.

programme.title: Best Ever Trivia Show
programme.desc: All Treats, No Tricks : Everyday people enter a fun-filled showdown with Trivia Experts, hoping to join their elite ranks. Can returning champion Miguel best the Experts to get one step closer to earning his spot amongst the legends? Sherri Shepherd hosts.

programme.title: Catch 21
programme.desc: The King Dance : Players add cards by answering pop trivia questions and try to build the closest hand to 21 without busting in this fast-action game of knowledge and strategy.

programme.title: Minute To Win It
programme.desc: The Visionaries : Teams face up to ten 60-second challenges for a chance to win up to $250,000 in this game show hosted by Apolo Anton Ohno.

programme.title: Idiotest
programme.desc: East Coast vs. West Coast 2 : Comedian Ben Gleib hosts this special rivalry edition of Idiotest as an East Coast team faces off against a West Coast team to answer increasingly difficult brain teaser puzzles.

programme.title: Idiotest
programme.desc: Dating Couple vs. Friends : Comedian Ben Gleib hosts as a Writer and a Camp Director compete against a Designer and an Animator to answer increasingly difficult brain teaser puzzles.

programme.title: Idiotest
programme.desc: Sisters vs. Brothers : Comedian Ben Gleib hosts this special Sibling Rivalry edition of Idiotest as Sisters face off against Brothers to answer increasingly difficult brain teaser puzzles.

programme.title: Idiotest
programme.desc: Retail Co-Workers vs. Brothers : Comedian Ben Gleib hosts as two brothers compete against co-workers to answer increasingly difficult brain teaser puzzles.

programme.title: America Says
programme.desc: The Stylists vs. The Bakers : Two teams of friends and family race against a clock to guess how America filled in the blanks on a series of survey questions covering every topic under the sun. John Michael Higgins hosts.

programme.title: America Says
programme.desc: The Waiters vs. Team Bunco : Two teams of friends and family race against a clock to guess how America filled in the blanks on a series of survey questions covering every topic under the sun. John Michael Higgins hosts.

programme.title: America Says
programme.desc: Soccer Moms vs. The Shakespeare Club : Two teams of friends and family race against a clock to guess how America filled in the blanks on a series of survey questions covering every topic under the sun. John Michael Higgins hosts.

programme.title: Get A Clue
programme.desc: Flea for All : Get a clue or give a clue in this exciting word puzzle game. Each team must do both, taking turns guessing words and giving hints down the line in the hopes of making it to the final round. Rob Belushi hosts.

programme.title: Emogenius
programme.desc: Team Geminites vs. Team Bay Babes : Using emojis to solve pop culture puzzles, two teams compete to see who is the best at using everyone's favorite texting language. Hunter March hosts this unique game show.

programme.title: Cram
programme.desc: Cram 1018 : Two teams of contestants compete for a chance at $10,000 after staying awake for 24 hours to "cram" test material that they will be quizzed on the following day.

programme.title: Baggage
programme.desc: Sleeping Beauty : Jerry Springer hosts as daters decide how much emotional "baggage" they are willing to put up with when finding love. A dater must choose between men whose baggage includes having a severe sleep disorder and growing medical marijuana.

programme.title: Baggage
programme.desc: Quick Pick Up Artist : Jerry Springer hosts as daters decide how much emotional "baggage" they will put up with for love. A dater must choose between women whose baggage includes eating her own peeled skin and spending $1,000 a month on lottery tickets.

programme.title: Baggage
programme.desc: Spy Love You : Jerry Springer hosts as daters decide how much emotional "baggage" they will put up with to find love. A dater must choose between women whose baggage includes wearing disguises to spy on her boyfriend and believing the Bible is a hoax.

programme.desc: Medium Man : Jerry Springer hosts as daters decide how much emotional "baggage" they are willing to put up with to find love. A dater must choose between men whose baggage includes speaking to the dead and not being able to sit through a whole movie.

programme.title: The Dick Van Dyke Show

programme.title: The Dick Van Dyke Show
programme.desc: The Twizzle : Sally drags the entire gang to a bowling alley when she discovers a new dance sensation that's sure to sweep the nation.

programme.title: The Dick Van Dyke Show
programme.desc: A Bird in the Head Hurts : Ritchie claims he keeps being attacked by a giant woodpecker.

programme.title: The Dick Van Dyke Show
programme.desc: Gesundheit, Darling : Rob begins to worry after neighbor Jerry suggests Rob's recent sneezing fits are psychosomatic expressions of repressed rage at Laura.

programme.title: The Dick Van Dyke Show
programme.desc: A Man's Teeth Are Not His Own : Rob feels that he has betrayed his dentist friend, Jerry Helper when he lets another dentist work on his teeth.

programme.title: The Dick Van Dyke Show
programme.desc: Somebody Has to Play Cleopatra : While directing the annual variety show, Rob becomes frustrated by spousal jealousies as he tries to pair the perfect 'Cleopatra' to 'Mark Antony' for the lead roles.

programme.title: The Dick Van Dyke Show
programme.desc: The Cat Burglar : After a string of burglaries in the neighborhood, the Petrie home is pillaged. But the police are baffled as it happened.

programme.desc: The Foul Weather Girl : Laura sees a weather girl as a threat to her marriage.

programme.title: The Dick Van Dyke Show
programme.desc: Will You Be My Wife? : Rob recounts the wrath he encountered when he broke his engagement with his hometown sweetheart, Dorothy after he and Laura became engaged.

programme.title: The Dick Van Dyke Show
programme.desc: Ray Murdock's X-Ray : Rob finds himself in hot water after giving a television interview in which he unwittingly portrays his wife Laura as a nut.

programme.title: The Dick Van Dyke Show
programme.desc: I Was a Teenage Head Writer : Rob leaves the show after Mel rejects his script and is upset when Buddy and Sally don't join him.

programme.title: The Dick Van Dyke Show
programme.desc: It May Look Like a Walnut : Rob and Laura watch a scary movie only to find certain details of that movie coming true the following day.

programme.title: The Dick Van Dyke Show
programme.desc: My Husband Is a Check-Grabber : Laura tries to break Rob of his expensive habit of picking up the check.

programme.title: The Dick Van Dyke Show
programme.desc: Don't Trip Over That Mountain : To his regret, Rob ignores Laura's warning to be careful on the slopes during his first skiing excursion.

programme.title: The Dick Van Dyke Show
programme.desc: Give Me Your Walls : The Petries hire a painter who ends up painting much more than just their living room.

programme.title: The Dick Van Dyke Show
programme.desc: The Sam Pomerantz Scandals : Rob, Laura, and the office gang put together a variety show to help out an old friend.

programme.title: The Dick Van Dyke Show

programme.title: The Dick Van Dyke Show

programme.title: The Dick Van Dyke Show

programme.title: The Dick Van Dyke Show

programme.title: The Dick Van Dyke Show

programme.title: The Dick Van Dyke Show

programme.title: The Dick Van Dyke Show

programme.desc: Alex Jumps out of an Airplane : A woman questions Alex's courage; he becomes a daredevil and has an exciting ski-trip; he decides to live life to the fullest from then on and signs up for skydiving for the first time.

programme.desc: Foreign Relations : Krystle launches her new business with the purchase of an Arabian horse. Sexual tension between Steven and Luke mounts. Jeff and Nikki return from Bolivia with the news of their marriage and they move into the mansion.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Triangles : Blake returns triumphant from his negotiations with the Chinese. Alexis vows to buy into the venture. Krystle, uncomfortable with Daniel's increasing attention, avoids him. Blake invites Amanda to accompany him on a business trip to Acapulco.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: The Ball : Alexis attempts to persuade the head of the Chinese delegation to hire Colbyco. Blake is surprised to learn Lady Ashley is an Acapulco. Amanda has a romantic fling with Prince Michael of Moldavia. Krystle makes a surprise visit to Daniel.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Kidnapped : As Alexis and Amanda emerge from an exclusive bridal salon, a car suddenly screeches to a halt and Amanda is pulled inside. A high-speed chase ensues. As Dex forces the kidnapper's car onto the sidewalk, Amanda breaks free.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: The Heiress : Dex tells a devastated Krystle that Daniel Reece is dead. Steven is outraged when Sammy Jo decides to fight for custody of her son in court. Jeff proposes marriage to Ashley. Sammy Jo learns that her monies will be held in trust with Krystle as executor.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: The Collapse : Tensions between Krystle and Blake mount as their suspicions of one another grow. Claudia regrets sleeping with Adam. Dominique derails Alexis' attempt to buyout her company, but is unable to stop Brady's divorce proceedings.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Life and Death : Dominique remains in critical condition after collapsing. Luke pays an unexpected visit to Steven. Blake tells his son that he will support him regardless of his sexual persuasion. Alexis calls her former lover, King Galen, a Middle Eastern monarch.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Parental Consent : Alexis attempts to persuade King Galen to allow a marriage between Amanda and his son. She sweetens the offer by suggesting his country would receive a portion of Colbyco's revenues. Dominique advises Krystle to reconcile with Blake.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Photo Finish : Alexis is relieved and Blake is concerned when Amanda suddenly changes her mind and decides to marry Prince Michael. Sammy Jo is revealed to be the culprit behind the compromising photographs.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: The Crash : Claudia flies to Mexico to divorce Steven. Unexpectedly, Adam appears at her hotel and they spend the night together. After Amanda embarrasses Prince Michael at Dominique's party, his patience is exhausted and he leaves her.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Reconciliation : Blake and Daniel survive the plane crash. Jeff charters a helicopter and braves hazardous conditions to finally locate the wreckage. Krystle and Blake finally clear the air and renew their commitment to each other.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Sammy Jo : Krystle accompanies Daniel to New York for his reunion with Sammy Jo, the child he's never known. While looking through photos Ashley snapped on assignment at a rock concert, Jeff is stunned to spot Fallon among the crowd.

programme.title: Dynasty

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Wood-be Killer : A killer tries to incinerate everything that could link him to his crime. But in doing so, he inadvertently creates new forensic evidence. Detectives employ a technique never before used in a criminal investigation to bring it to light.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Journey to Justice : 6-year-old Nicole Rae Walker was killed in a hit-and-run in her Ft. Lauderdale neighborhood. The prosecutor combines the talents of an accident reconstruction expert with a video specialist to create a graphic demonstration of the moment of impact.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Seeds for Doubt : In 2002, a small community in upstate New York was devastated when Patty Wlasiuk died in a truck accident. But burdock seed pods found in her hair and on her clothes indicated that this was no accident — it was cold-blooded murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Dirty Laundry : The victim was a self-made man who never minced words. Perhaps he was murdered by a disgruntled client or employee. Perhaps the racy photos in his safe held the clue to solving the crime.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Pinned by the Evidence : After a street fight takes the life of a national wrestling champion, police must determine if he was killed in cold blood or in self-defense.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Insect Clues : Between 1985 and 1988, 18 people were choked, molested and left for dead in the remote mountains of California. The only witnesses were the insects — and they play an important role in solving the crimes and bringing the killer to justice.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Breaking News : A young TV news producer is raped and murdered in her apartment. Police identify two suspects, but both are cleared of any wrongdoing. When the case stalls for more than a year, investigators turn to the Commonwealth of Virginia's DNA Databank.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Wood-be Killer : A killer tries to incinerate everything that could link him to his crime. But in doing so, he inadvertently creates new forensic evidence. Detectives employ a technique never before used in a criminal investigation to bring it to light.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Insignificant Others : How unlucky could one man be? His college sweetheart killed herself and fourteen years later, his wife ended her life in a similar way. Investigators had to determine if this was murder or simply a bizarre coincidence.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Material Evidence : When police find the body of 11-year-old Krista Harrison, there are few clues to the killer's identity. But authorities are intrigued by unusual orange fibers embedded in clothing found near the victim.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Ties That Bind : Who was the sexual offender who murdered two adolescent boys in Nebraska? The key to stopping him would be the unique composition of the "junk rope" he used to tie his victims.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Second Shot at Love : When heart surgeon Darryl Sutorius is found dead in the basement of his upscale Cincinnati home, police assume he committed suicide. Further investigation reveals that his new wife Della has a history of violence and an insatiable desire for money.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Gold Rush : Emergency dispatch received a call from a man who said his girlfriend shot and killed herself. The autopsy revealed that the gunshot wound was not self-inflicted, and the evidence on her body would give police a golden opportunity to catch her killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Hear No Evil : In 2006, Darlene VanderGiesen received threatening emails and then disappeared. Tracking the source of the emails led police to the home of Daphne Wright, where they believe a murder was committed.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Army of Evidence : A mother of two young children was found dead in her bedroom. Her death was ruled a suicide — but when investigators learned she had almost died in a house fire three years earlier, they decided to take another look at the evidence.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Frozen Evidence : One investigator's quick thinking helps him capture a shoe impression made in snow before the evidence melts away. The shoe leads investigators to Peter Benedict and Frank Lanoue, who are convicted of aggravated assault and robbery.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Trouble Brewing : Two suspects are linked to a murder by bloodstained boots and a gun, but the owner of the items says he has never met the victim. Investigators hope manufacturing codes from beer bottles will determine who is telling the truth.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Deadly Valentine : An obstetrician returned home from the hospital and found his wife on the bathroom floor. She was covered with blood and not breathing. He tried unsuccessfully to revive her, staining his clothes with her blood in the process.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Bump in the Night : When a victim is brutally murdered in his own bed, investigators find a shoe impression in the mud outside — physical evidence they hope will lead to the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Shattered Dreams : When a car was found in a drainage ditch with two bodies inside, a fingertip torn from a latex glove would point investigators to both the crime scene and the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Mistaken For Dead : In 1988, when a patient dies unexpectedly in the office of California neurologist Richard Boggs, police begin what they think will be a routine investigation. Soon they uncover a bizarre story of corpse stealing, fake identity and sexual perversion.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Bagging a Killer : In 1999, 9-year-old Valiree Jackson vanished on her way to school near Spokane. Her father, Brad Jackson, reported the disappearance and the entire community started searching for her abductor.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: The Magic Bullet : A fifteen-year-old boy dies from a mysterious gunshot wound to the head while sitting in the lobby of his father's gun club. Ballistics, laser technology, made-to-scale models and the latest in forensic animation are used to find the cause.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Wheel of Misfortune : Casino security cameras tracked a young woman's movements until shortly before she disappeared. She was never seen again, but through the evidence she left behind, she was able to tell investigators what happened to her and who was responsible.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Calculated Coincidence : A young woman is found dead in her apartment. With little evidence at the scene, the case turns cold — until police discover a link between their prime suspect and an unsolved murder committed six years earlier in a different state.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Letter Perfect : A healthy young man dies mysteriously in his sleep and toxicology tests reveal a lethal dose of lidocaine in his blood. Investigators find a suicide note and presume he killed himself until a forensic linguist examines the note.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Deadly Curve : It was supposed to be a routine motorcade for the Queen of England. But on the way to Yosemite National Park, a car carrying three Secret Service agents collided with a car driven by a deputy from the local sheriff's office.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Southside Strangler : Timothy Wilson Spencer was identified as the man who raped and strangled five young women in Virginia. With the use of DNA profiling, an innocent man is freed and the real killer is convicted.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Deadly Parasites : In 1993, winter storms carried manure into Milwaukee's water supply, leading to an epidemic of illness.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Shear Luck : In 1991, when the wife of a serviceman was brutally murdered in the Philippines, investigators had to reassemble a tiny computer disk that had been cut to pieces in order to find the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Flashover : A fire erupts in Kings Cross Station in London, killing 31 people and injuring dozens more. Investigators pinpoint the cause of the fire, but it takes state-of-the-art technology and fluid dynamics experts to explain why it became a deadly inferno.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A Shot in the Dark : Two sets of scientists probe a woman's death.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A Clutch of Witnesses : Two eyewitnesses may hold the key to the death of a motorcycle gang member.

programme.title: 48 Hours
programme.desc: For Love or Money? : Celeste Beard claims she is innocent of the murder of her husband Steven Beard, co-founder of an Austin television station. After a life of abuse and depression, Celeste married Beard. In October 1999, Beard was fatally shot while lying in bed.

programme.title: 48 Hours
programme.desc: Live to Tell: Sophia's Secret : When a 17-year-old girl breaks up with her abusive boyfriend, he snaps and breaks into her bedroom to attack her.

programme.title: 48 Hours
programme.desc: AKA Rockefeller : Authorities suspect a con man who has used many different identities may be a murderer.

programme.title: 48 Hours
programme.desc: Tacoma Confidential : A report on corruption and a cover-up by city officials of Tacoma, Washington, focusing on David Brame, the city’s police chief who rose to power despite a shady past.

programme.title: 48 Hours
programme.desc: Power and Passion : 48 Hours probes case of Alabama politician Stephen Nodine -- accused in the 2010 shooting death of his mistress, Angel Downs.

programme.title: 48 Hours
programme.desc: The Highway of Tears : Since 1969, more than 20 girls and women have disappeared or been killed along a road in, Canada, known as Highway 16.

programme.title: 48 Hours
programme.desc: Taken: The Amber Dubois Story : A report on the February 2009 disappearance of Amber Dubois, just blocks from Escondido High School in California. 48 HOURS examines the permanent impact her disappearance has had on her family, even after the discovery and conviction of the murderer.

programme.title: 48 Hours
programme.desc: Why Did Eric Kill? : A report on Eric Smith who in August 1993, at age 13, was convicted of murdering four-year-old Derrick Robie. The child’s body was found strangled and battered with rocks near his home in Savona, N.Y.

programme.title: 48 Hours
programme.desc: Killer Performance : The 2010 murder investigation of 23-year-old dancer Julie Kibuishi in Southern California, and how her friend Sam Herr, became the prime suspect in the case until investigators encountered an aspiring actor with a horrific tale to tell.

programme.title: 48 Hours
programme.desc: The Devil's Twin : Identical twin brothers suspected of committing a murder after studying a crime show on TV.

programme.title: 48 Hours
programme.desc: The Informer : A report on the moral dilemma faced by Jim Morel, a Massachusetts musician, who was told by another musician friend, Jason Weir, that the 2001 death of Marina Calabro, the aunt of their bandmate Anthony Calabro, though ruled an accident, was murder.

programme.title: 48 Hours
programme.desc: Taken Away : A missing woman is found dead in Texas; interviews with her family, friends, investigators, and boyfriend.

programme.title: 48 Hours
programme.desc: Shelley's Last Breath : An investigation into the 1999 scuba diving death of Shelley Tyre while on vacation on the Caribbean isle of Tortola. Police questioned her husband and dive partner David Swain about every detail of the dive; autopsy results were inconclusive.

programme.title: 48 Hours
programme.desc: Witness : Charles Forshee, a 56-year-old foster father in Houston, Texas, was charged with the asphyxiation-murder, on June 21, 2001, of Dillon Ferrar, a child in his care.

programme.title: 48 Hours
programme.desc: Ryan Ferguson: Wrongful Conviction : The case of Ryan Ferguson, who was released from prison in 2013, after nearly 10 years behind bars for murder. 48 HOURS team have been investigating the murder and the bizarre circumstances that put Ryan Ferguson in prison for the crime since 2006

programme.title: 48 Hours
programme.desc: Deadly Ride : Jane Mixer, a student at the University of Michigan Law School in March of 1969, had just agreed to get married and had arranged a ride home to tell her parents. Her body was found in a small, rural cemetery just miles from her dorm.

programme.title: 48 Hours
programme.desc: An Eye for An Eye : A report on the October 2004 murder of Dr. Brian Stidham, a pediatric eye surgeon in Tucson, Arizona, and the subsequent investigation which led to the trial and conviction of his colleague Dr. Bradley Schwartz.

programme.title: 48 Hours
programme.desc: Death on the Hudson : New information in the case of a woman accused of killing her fiance during a kayaking trip may prove her innocence.

programme.title: 48 Hours
programme.desc: Over the Edge : A report on the investigation into the 2009 disappearance of Dawn Viens, and why her husband, California chef David Viens, jumped off a cliff when he became a suspect in her disappearance.

programme.title: 48 Hours
programme.desc: Death Wish : A report surrounding the July 2009 death of Jeffrey Locker, whose body was found slumped over the steering wheel of his car in Harlem, New York. When authorities tracked Locker’s ATM card to Kenneth Minor, Minor said Locker had begged Minor to kill him.

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show
programme.desc: My Teen Daughter Wants a Baby : 17-year-old Naomi has undergone a sudden attitude change and is on a mission to have a baby. Parents Leeanders and April need Steve to intervene!

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show
programme.desc: You Stole 15 Years of My Life : Jennifer left home to protect herself from her stepdad Allen. 15 years later, her mother wants a second chance, but Jennifer is hesitant. Can Steve help mend this broken family?

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show
programme.desc: She Is My Property : Lanika is sick and tired of her boyfriend Malcom’s abusive ways. Then, Tim’s jealousy has torn his family apart, but now he’s desperate to win them back, but will Tiffany leave him for good?

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: I'm Your Pimp, Not Your Boyfriend : Pimp Hotlanta will set Nika straight about their relationship. Stephanie confronts her pal Erika for having sex with her man. Gloria was crushed when she found out that her sister stole her man.

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Dancing Queen Showdown : Carlton is here to reveal to his girlfriend that he’s leading a gay double life. Plus Tom Bergeron from TV’s ‘Dancing with The Stars’ will play celebrity judge in a dance-off. Then, Crystal reveals her infidelity to her husband Bobby.

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Michael cheated on his wife Alecia with a stripper who may now be pregnant. Sarah confronts a stripper named Amy who she says slept with her man. Missy is here to lay down the laws of the strip club.

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Jaw Dropping Wedding : Jake slept with his brother Joe’s fiancé. Then, Danny claims he’s leaving his fiancé Heather for a professional escort named Chelsi. Plus more stories of wild nuptials.

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: I'm Leaving My Wife For a Tranny : John is cheating on his wife Destinee with Cici, but Cici's got some secrets too. Then, Lala drops a bombshell on her man. Plus Michael and his wife Tayliana both have secrets to reveal to each other.

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: I'm Karate Kicking You Out! : Greg tells Kim that he wants to start dating Mandy. Shannon confronts Dominic and friend Brandy for their affair. Plus, Leah wants her girlfriend Mary to choose between her or her ex Richelle!

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: My Wife Moved Her Boyfriend In : Allen's wife Latasha moved in her boyfriend Boo and Allen's ready to put his foot down. Will Latasha cave in or will she leave Allen for Boo? Don't miss this on Jerry Springer!

programme.title: Divorce Court
programme.desc: Socially Distanced Marriage : Dante admits he cheated on Theresa several times during their marriage because Theresa wouldn't touch him! Theresa says Dante is a liar and a cheater and she is done! Can Judge Mablean Ephriam help them come to an agreement?

programme.title: Divorce Court
programme.desc: Stingy Deadbeat Dad : Kris says Walter is a deadbeat dad who turned his back on their sick son! Walter has a new woman in his life and won't give a dime towards child support! Can Judge Mablean Ephriam get their children the financial help they need?

programme.title: Divorce Court
programme.desc: False Positive : Patrick claims Shannon cheated on him on their honeymoon and faked a pregnancy. Shannon says she is not ready to let go and wants to stay together. Can Judge Mablean Ephriam help this husband and wife reconnect?

programme.title: Divorce Court
programme.desc: Respect Me! : Pinkye says she needs a man that is responsible and caring unlike Brian. Brian says the problem is he needs someone who treats him with respect. Can Judge Mablean Ephriam help dissolve their marriage amicably?

programme.title: Divorce Court
programme.desc: Cheater Be Gone : Willie says Naomi is a cheater and she is not good enough for him. Naomi claims Willie had a 2 year affair during their marriage and the trust is gone. Can Judge Mablean Ephriam help them come to peaceful terms?

programme.title: Divorce Court
programme.desc: Age and Love Gap : Tracie claims their 25 year age gap was not a problem until Gene started to become controlling. Gene says Tracie's wardrobe leaves little to the imagination and he doesn't approve of her job. Can Judge Mablean Ephriam help them separate peacefully?

programme.title: Divorce Court
programme.desc: A Fortnight Lover : Tony Claims Angel started cheating on him as early as 2 weeks into their marriage. Now, Angel has brought the same man she was caught cheating with, to court with her. Will Judge Mablean Ephriam be able to keep things civilized?

programme.title: Divorce Court
programme.desc: Sloppy Fights, Clean Break? : Camille claims Gary is a pig who doesn't take care of himself. Gary says Camille won't do laundry or clean the house. Can Judge Mablean Ephriam help these two end their marriage with a clean divorce?

programme.title: Divorce Court
programme.desc: Garden of Secrets : Melissa says Garrett lied about his secret life. Garrett claims Melissa is lying about the paternity of their child. Will Judge Mablean Ephriam help prove Garrett is the father?

programme.title: Divorce Court
programme.desc: Contractually Obligated : Jim claims Toni is not fulfilling her wifely duties. Toni says Jim is disrespectful and calls her names. Can Judge Mablean Ephriam help these two dissolve their marriage respectfully?

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Let's Go and Meet Master Cat Viper! : There's only one key to finding out what happened to Sanji - and Luffy and the others make their way towards finding out more about their friend's disappearance, but on their way the indigenous fauna give them trouble!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy's Decision! Sanji on the Brink of Quitting! : Luffy hatches a plan to help Sanji, but he'll have to go alone to avoid an all-out war with Big Mom. Meanwhile, Kin'emon and Kanjuro finally arrive at Zou, unwittingly setting the stage for the Minks' thirst for revenge!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: A Volatile Situation! The Dog and the Cat and the Samurai! : The samurai have landed! And they make their way into the country of Zou unaware of the welcome they will receive by the Minks!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Morgan versus Luffy! Who's the Mysterious Pretty Girl? : Luffy is in the line of fire after saving Zoro, and now tyrannical Captain Morgan is out for their heads! Zoro must decide if he will join forces with Luffy or die in captivity.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy's Past! Enter Red-Haired Shanks! : Luffy recalls a time when Captain Red-Haired Shanks taught him a valuable lesson in friendship and set him on his quest to be King of the Pirates.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: A Terrifying Mysterious Power! Captain Buggy, the Clown Pirate! : Luffy crosses paths with the clever thief Nami. A navigator on a quest to collect one hundred million berries, she’s perfect for Luffy’s new crew – except for the fact that Nami hates pirates.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Desperate Situation! Beast Tamer Mohji vs. Luffy! : Having delivered a deadly blow to Captain Buggy’s pirates, Luffy and his companions need a place to recuperate. But the three are not in hiding very long before the Beast Tamer Mohji seeks them out.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Epic Showdown! Swordsman Zoro vs. Acrobat Cabaji! : In the ongoing fight with Captain Buggy’s pirates, Zoro must face off with the Acrobat Cabaji while Luffy continues to do battle with the Pirate Clown himself.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Who is the Victor? Devil Fruit Power Showdown! : Luffy and the gang are on the run after the battle with Captain Buggy! With no place to go and nothing else to do, Nami finally agrees to join Luffy on his quest.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The Honorable Liar? Captain Usopp! : Luffy, Zoro, and Nami arrive at an island hoping to obtain a ship and crew, but the three are quickly confronted with the blustering Captain Usopp – who has a connection to Luffy’s past.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The Weirdest Guy Ever! Jango the Hypnotist! : Luffy follows Usopp to the mansion and encounters the brutal pirate Captain Kuro. The scoundrel plans to claim Kaya’s fortune and live the stolen life of luxury.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Expose the Plot! Pirate Butler, Captain Kuro! : Usopp spreads the word of Kuro’s evil plot and the impending pirate attack, but no one believes his warnings. The Straw Hat Pirates decide to help Usopp put a stop to the dastardly scheme.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Clash with the Black Cat Pirates! The Great Battle on the Slope! : Luffy and crew seek to best Captain Kuro, but they’ve prepared their defense on the wrong side of the island! All looks grim now that Usopp must face off against the Black Cat Pirates alone.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The Terrifying Duo! Meowban Brothers vs. Zoro! : In an effort to save Usopp’s village, the Straw Hat Pirates seek to block the marauders’ path from the sea. With Luffy out of the battle, Zoro must face the fearsome Meowban Brothers!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy Back in Action! Miss Kaya's Desperate Resistance! : Nami manages to rescue Zoro’s missing swords and attempts to revive Luffy. With one of the Meowban brothers down, the other rages on even more fiercely than before!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Beat Kuro! Usopp the Man's Tearful Resolve! : Usopp’s friends run away with the heiress Kaya. Jango races off after them, but not before sending Butchie into a berserk rage. As Zoro continues his battle, Luffy takes on Captain Kuro.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Protect Kaya! The Usopp Pirates' Great Efforts! : Luffy battles with Kuro on the beach, while the Veggies (with Kaya in tow) flee Jango the Hypnotist.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Anger Explosion! Kuro vs. Luffy! How it Ends! : Kaya rewards the Straw Hat Pirates’ efforts to save her with a ship to call their own – the Going Merry!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: You're the Weird Creature! Gaimon and His Strange Friends! : On the legendary Treasure Island, Luffy and crew encounter strange animals and an even stranger man named Gaimon.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The Three-Sword Style's Past! Zoro and Kuina's Vow! : In the past, young Zoro sparred constantly with a girl named Kuina, but he could never claim victory. They vowed that one of them would someday be the world’s greatest swordsman – but tragedy intervened.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Famous Cook! Sanji of the Sea Restaurant! : The Straw Hats need a cook among their crew, so they head to a nearby restaurant and meet a passionate Sous Chef named Sanji.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Unwelcome Customer! Sanji's Food and Ghin's Debt! : Luffy witnesses the fighting prowess and compassionate nature of the Sous Chef Sanji. The good news: The Going Merry’s found a cook! The bad news: He has no intention of joining the crew!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The Strongest Pirate Fleet! Commodore Don Krieg! : The staff and patrons of the Baratie panic when Don Krieg arrives! The starving pirate begs for nourishment, only to find himself denied. Unable to see a wretch starve, Sanji steps in once again.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: I'm Luffy! The Man Who's Gonna Be King of the Pirates! : Countless souls have been lured along the Grand Line in pursuit of the legendary One Piece! Luffy D. Monkey is a young pirate with a dream: to prove the legend true and be king of them all!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Enter the Great Swordsman! Pirate Hunter Roronoa Zoro! : Luffy and his new companion Coby set sail in search of the infamous pirate hunter Zoro, rumored to be held captive at the Marine Base.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Morgan versus Luffy! Who's the Mysterious Pretty Girl? : Luffy is in the line of fire after saving Zoro, and now tyrannical Captain Morgan is out for their heads! Zoro must decide if he will join forces with Luffy or die in captivity.
