programme.desc: Dora's Knighthood Adventure! : Dora's Knighthood Adventure!: Dora and Boots are reading stories about knights with their friends Rocinante the horse and Dapple the donkey when suddenly they hear a cry for help.

programme.title: Dora the Explorer
programme.desc: Dora's Knighthood Adventure! : Dora and Boots are reading stories about knights when suddenly they hear a cry for help. It's a princess who's calling us from the Royal Garden! It turns out that it's not the princess that needs saving – her kitty's stuck in a tree!

programme.title: Dora the Explorer
programme.desc: Swiper's Favorite Things : Swiper was packing all of his favorite things for a sleepover at his Grandma's House. But just as he was about to go, a big wind came in and blew everything away! Will Swiper find a way to use his new super-Swiper-spin today?!

programme.title: Dora the Explorer
programme.desc: A Ribbon for Pinto : When the train to the Big Horse Show breaks down, Dora, Boots, and Pinto the Pony need your help to get there with the ribbons, so Pinto can win his first blue prize ribbon!

programme.title: Dora the Explorer
programme.desc: Benny the Castaway : Dora and Boots are getting ready for a big beach picnic with their friends, but when Benny gets stranded on Coconut Island, he'll need rescuing from Dora, Boots, and YOU!

programme.title: Dora the Explorer
programme.desc: Dora's Fantastic Gymnastics Adventure : Dora gets to start the Big Gymnastics Show! But when Swiper swipes her special rainbow ribbon, Dora and Boots need your help on a gymnastics-filled adventure to get it back so they can begin the show! Fantastic gymnastics!

programme.title: Dora the Explorer
programme.desc: Dora's Moonlight Adventure : One night, while taking care of Abuela's 3 kitties, Dora awakens to find that Lucky has chased a ball of string right into a storybook world! Help her find him on a magical moonlight adventure!

programme.title: Dora the Explorer
programme.desc: Perrito's Big Surprise : Dora has a big surprise for Perrito on Surprise Hill, but Swiper's trying to get there first to swipe it! Join Dora, Boots, and Perrito for an animal-filled adventure with help from lots of friends and their playful pets too!

programme.title: Dora the Explorer
programme.desc: Dora's Thanksgiving Day Parade : Everyone's getting ready for the big Thanksgiving Day parade and dinner, but the Pirate Piggies accidentally float away on Dora's boat float.

programme.title: Dora the Explorer
programme.desc: Check Up Day : Dora's on her way to the doctors for her yearly check-up! Dora likes going to see Dr. Valdés because she gets to hear her heartbeat, see how much she's grown in one year, and get a new sticker at the end of the visit!

programme.title: Dora the Explorer
programme.desc: Little Map : Little Map: Map has been teaching his nephew, Little Map, how to draw pictures that help us on our adventures. And he's getting really good, so today he's ready for his very first treasure adventure!

programme.title: Dora the Explorer
programme.desc: Little Map : Map has been teaching his nephew, Little Map, how to draw pictures that help us on our adventures, and today he's ready for his first treasure adventure! We help Little Map draw pictures and play map games to find the treasure at Treasure Mountain!

programme.title: Dora the Explorer
programme.desc: Baby Bongo's Big Music Show : Dora and Boots take Baby Bongo on a musical adventure as they race to the Big Music Show in time for Baby Bongo's first performance.

programme.title: Dora the Explorer
programme.desc: School Science Fair : Dora and Isa have been learning how the Earth's natural energy can power things we use every day. So they've made a volcano for the Science Fair!

programme.title: Dora the Explorer
programme.desc: Dora's Rescue in Mermaid Kingdom : Dora and Boots are at the beach when they find a little lost mermaid who needs to get back to her mommy at Mermaid Cove. Together the 3 set off on an underwater adventure!

programme.title: Dora the Explorer
programme.desc: ¡Vamos a Pintar! : Dora and Boots discover Pincel, a cute little paintbrush who's lost and really wants to get back to Painter Daniella at the Art Studio.

programme.title: Dora the Explorer
programme.desc: Dora Rocks! : Today's Benny's Sing-Along Party where Dora and Benny are going to sing a very special song together! C'mon, let's all sing-along!

programme.title: Dora the Explorer
programme.desc: The Butterfly Ball : Dora and Boots take a rainbow butterfly, Mariposa, to the Butterfly Ball where everybody gets to have wings.

programme.title: Dora the Explorer
programme.desc: Dora and Diego's Amazing Animal Circus Adventure : Dora and Diego's Amazing Animal Circus Adventure: Join Dora and Diego on an adventure to see Boots and Baby Jaguar's Amazing Animal Circus, featuring Perrito, the kitties, Tico, Isa, Benny, and lots more animal friends!

programme.title: Dora the Explorer
programme.desc: Dora and Diego's Amazing Animal Circus Adventure : Dora and her cousin Diego are on their way to a big surprise. It's Boots and Baby Jaguar's Amazing Animal Circus!

programme.title: Dora the Explorer
programme.desc: Book Explorers : Dora and Boots become book explorers and enter the worlds of Peter Pan, the Wizard of Oz, and Little Red Riding Hood so they can find missing objects for the library's Story Wall.

programme.title: Dora the Explorer
programme.desc: Dora's Super Soccer Showdown : Dora's Super Soccer Showdown: Dora travels to Brazil to play in the Big Cup Soccer Tournament, and if her team can beat the Monsters, they'll win the big cup.

programme.title: Dora the Explorer
programme.desc: Dora and Diego in the Time of Dinosaurs : Dora and Diego in the Time of Dinosaurs: Dora and Diego travel back to prehistoric times and go on a dinosaur adventure to find Baby Jaguar and bring him home to his birthday party.

programme.title: Dora the Explorer
programme.desc: Dora in Wonderland : Dora in Wonderland: While Dora's kitties run through a magic mirror, Dora becomes Dora in Wonderland! Join her and Boots on a double-length adventure through the magical, mixed-up world of Wonderland!

programme.title: Dora the Explorer
programme.desc: Dora's Royal Rescue : Dora's Royal Rescue: Dora and Boots and the noble horse, Rocinante, are off to Story Castle to rescue Don Quixote from the evil wizard, Malambruno.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show

programme.title: Walker, Texas Ranger

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: The Fox Hunt : Lucy is jealous after Ricky dances with Angela Randall, an up-and-coming British actress. She gets Ricky away from her by going to the country estate of Sir Clive Richardson, a prominent English film producer, for a fox hunt he is hosting.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy Goes To Scotland : The Ricardos and Mertzes prepare to leave London for Paris, Lucy realizes that they will not have time to visit her ancestral land of Scotland. She was looking forward to seeking out members of the McGillicuddy clan, her distant relatives.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Paris At Last : Equipped with an English-French dictionary, Lucy sets out to explore Paris and discover an artist whose paintings will become very valuable – she knows she has "the eye."

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: The Ricardos Visit Cuba : Ricky and Fred are scheduled to judge a beauty contest but Lucy and Ethel plan for them to miss it. The four go out on a little cruise before the contest and Lucy has arranged for the boat's gas tank to be only half-filled.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Paris At Last : Equipped with an English-French dictionary, Lucy sets out to explore Paris and discover an artist whose paintings will become very valuable – she knows she has "the eye."

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy Meets Charles Boyer : The Ricardos and Mertzes, sightseeing in Paris, are sitting at a sidewalk cafe that Charles Boyer is known to frequent. Lucy thinks she has spotted Boyer and turns to jelly, but Ricky convinces her it's a case of mistaken identity.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy Gets A Paris Gown : Lucy goes on a hunger strike in order to get Ricky to buy an expensive dress from a famous French designer. He finally gives in but returns the dress when he discovers that Ethel smuggled her food while on the strike.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy In The Swiss Alps : Fred, managing Ricky's band while on European tour, routes the musicians to Locarno instead of Lucerne. Ricky is distraught and Lucy suggests a hike in the Alps with the Mertzes to take his mind off his problems.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy Gets Homesick in Italy : Fred Mertz, managing Ricky's European band tour, is very concerned over the expense incurred when he misrouted Ricky's band so he books second-class train passage for the overnight trip to Florence and a fourth-class hotel for their stay.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy's Italian Movie : The Ricardos and Mertzes are on a train for Rome when Lucy is 'discovered' by an Italian film director who offers her a role in his new picture, "Bitter Grapes".

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy's Bicycle Trip : The Ricardos and Mertzes are leaving Genoa for Nice when Lucy decides they should all go by bicycle because they can't see enough of the countries from the train. Ricky and the Mertzes agree under protest and after an exhausting day of pedaling.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy Goes To Monte Carlo : Ricky is working in Monte Carlo, but Fred goofed and bargained for too little money for the engagement. Lucy and Ethel go to the casino to watch, but when Lucy finds a chip that someone dropped and replaces it on the table, it wins and continues to do so.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Return Home from Europe : The Ricardos and Mertzes need to return to the United States by plane instead of ship creating problems for Lucy who has bought, among other souvenirs, a 30-pound cheese.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy and Bob Hope : Ricky is opening a new night spot, the Club Babalu, and wants Bob Hope to appear at the grand opening. Lucy fears Hope won't because of her widespread reputation for causing chaos, and wants to reassure him that this time she's butting out.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Little Ricky Learns To Play The Drums : Although they both agree not to try and influence Little Ricky's future, Lucy buys a toy doctor kit and Ricky gives him a drum set. Their son takes to the drums and begins to play it non-stop for days.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy Meets Orson Welles : Orson Welles is scheduled to perform for a benefit in Ricky's club. Ricky is worried that Lucy will foul things up if she is around so he decides to send her off to Florida.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Little Ricky Gets Stage Fright : Little Ricky is scheduled to play the drums in his first music school recital. Although his parents and the Mertzes are overcome with nervousness, Little Ricky seems calm until his big moment arrives, then goes to pieces.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Visitor From Italy : Mario, the Ricardos' and Mertzes' gondolier in Venice, comes to New York to surprise his brother, but turns up at the Ricardos' apartment when he can't find him.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Off To Florida : Lucy has misplaced her and Ethel's train tickets to Florida and they must share a ride with strange Mrs. Grundy. Mrs Grundy's odd behavior becomes more troubling to Lucy and Ethel when they learn that an escaped hatchet murderess matches her description.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Deep Sea Fishing : While on vacation in Florida, Lucy and Ethel go on a shopping spree and spend a whopping $140! To make sure that their wives don't repeat their spree Ricky and Fred take the ladies on their next fishing trip.

programme.desc: The Cult : Matlock believes in the innocence of a man whose brainwashed son insists he saw his father kill the leader of his cult. Ben is the only hope left for a concerned father whose son, David, has been swept into a religious cult.

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: The Priest : A lawyer friend of Matlock’s puts his faith in the crafty attorney when his client is accused of killing a feisty priest, Father Fitzgerald.

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: The Witness : Ben Matlock gives his assistant, Michelle Thomas, her toughest courtroom assignment... breaking down the eyewitness testimony of a former law classmate in a brutal murder case.

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: The Best Seller : District Attorney Julie March matches wits with tempestuous author Cynthia Slayton, whose torrid novels are suddenly eclipsed by facts surrounding the death of her best friend.

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: The Hunting Party (Part 1) : The serenity of historic Roanoke Island is shattered when a retired career soldier attempts to prove his late brother’s death was not a hunting accident, but murder.

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: The Good Boy : When Tony Morgan, a smooth-talking, seemingly perfect son, frames his mother for murder, no one even suspects his involvement. No one except Ben Matlock, who tries to prove the good boy isn’t so good after all.

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: The Ex : Ben Matlock finds himself in an awkward situation when he joins Julie March in Baltimore to help her defend an old friend accused of murder.

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: The Clown : Matlock holds the last ray of hope for a veteran circus clown, Homer Fleming, accused of murdering his partner during a performance.

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: The Star : Ben Matlock uncovers plots within a plot when Noel Bishop, the wunderkind director of horror films, is accused of murdering motion picture star Catherine McKay as the cameras roll.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: no info available

programme.title: Transformers: Armada
programme.desc: First Encounter : During the war on Cybertron, the Mini-Cons, mini-transformers who can be used as upgrades by their bigger brethren, crash lands on Earth. In present day, a group of children finds their ship by accident which brings the war to Earth.

programme.title: Transformers: Armada
programme.desc: Metamorphosis : Escaping from the confrontation between Bots and Cons, Alex, Rad and Carlos find the cargo hold of the Exodus underground and are adopted by three minicons. Retreating to the moon, the 'Cons make the wreck of the Exodus there their base.

programme.title: Transformers: Armada
programme.desc: Base : Alexis, Rad and Carlos introduce themselves to Optimus Prime, Hot Rod and First Aid, and get a condensed history of the conflict. Meanwhile, on the moon, Megatron plots to capture the minicons that are now appearing all over earth.

programme.title: Transformers: Armada
programme.desc: Chase : Trapped in cyberspace with Sideways, Alexis, Rad, Carlos and their minicons become aware of a massive evil entity, far more powerful and dangerous than Megatron, lurking threateningly in the background. Or was it all a dream?

programme.title: Transformers: Armada
programme.desc: Tactician : A new transformer enters the solar system. On the moon, Thrust the master tactician arrives to assist Megatron in his battle against the Autobots, but all does not go according to plan.

programme.title: Transformers: Armada
programme.desc: Linkup : With Optimus damaged and temporarily out of commission, the newly-arrived Jetfire takes command - and seriously underestimates the Decepticons. But on the verge of defeat, Optimus reveals a new ability.

programme.title: Transformers: Armada
programme.desc: Detection : On the moon, Thrust continues his plotting with Megatron. On earth, despite Jetfire saying he's one of the good guys, the kids are suspicious of Sideways - as are the Decepticons. And something huge and ominous is approaching earth.

programme.title: Transformers: Armada
programme.desc: Awakening : The massive Tidalwave joins the Decepticons, but is, seemingly, defeated in battle by Hot Shot and Blurr. Alexis discovers three new minicons, which Sideways says combine to create another ultimate weapon, the Requiem Blaster.

programme.title: Transformers: Armada
programme.desc: Desperate : The kids try to gather the three Requiem Blaster minicons together. Sky Blast at first resists, then sings the others to him to save Optimus. They all realise there's more to the minicons than first appears.

programme.title: Transformers: Armada
programme.desc: Runaway : Understanding that the minicons want to be in charge of their own destinies, the kids sneak the new team out of the base. Thrust finds them, but so do the Autobots who save the day. It's agreed the minicons should not be forced to fight.

programme.title: Transformers: Armada
programme.desc: Past, Part 1 : Enthusiastic young Sideswipe, Blurr's hero-worshipper, joins the team and Optimus tasks Hot Shot with training him. Wheeljack also arrives on earth, bent on revenge for Hot Shot seemingly abandoning him during a battle on Cybertron.

programme.title: Transformers: Armada
programme.desc: Past, Part 2 : Desperate to make amends to his old friend, Hot Shot allows Wheeljack to shoot him, but this isn't enough. Wheeljack takes Sideswipe hostage, but Hot Shot rescues him. On the moon, Megatron welcomes Wheeljack to the Decepticons.

programme.title: Transformers: Armada
programme.desc: Sacrifice : Megatron sacrifices Starscream, leaving him to face the Autobots alone while the Decepticons infiltrate the Autobot base to capture the Requiem Blaster. Smokescreen sacrifices himself to try to protect the Blaster minicons.

programme.title: Transformers: Armada
programme.desc: Regeneration : Hearing Megatron say he is nothing more than disposable cannon fodder, Starscream defects with the Star Sabre. To prove he's genuine, he gives the Autobots details of the moon base. Red Alert works on what's left of Smokescreen.

programme.title: Transformers: Armada
programme.desc: Rescue : With Starscream's help, the Autobots infiltrate the Decepticon moon base, attempting to rescue all the minicons Megatron has captured and forced into building a spaceship.

programme.title: Transformers: Armada
programme.desc: Mars : Alexis tracks a minicon in the vicinity of Mars. Starscream gets there first, but is disabled by Tidalwave. Jetfire rescues him: on the way back Starscream spots and tries to entice the minicon. But first they must get past Megatron.

programme.title: Transformers: Armada
programme.desc: Crack : With the kids befriending and welcoming him, the Autobots deeply suspicious of him, and driven by his need to kill Megatron, the deeply conflicted Starscream trusts Thrust and returns to the moon base with the Star Sabre and Skyboom Shield.

programme.title: Transformers: Armada
programme.desc: Threaten : Sabre, Shield and Blaster together create the Hydra Cannon. Installed on their new ship, the Decepticons test it on a comet - then Megatron orders Starscream to use it to destroy the Autobot base. Problem is, that'll also destroy the earth.

programme.title: Transformers: Armada
programme.desc: Crisis : Optimus and Jetfire attack the ship, but can't stop the Hydra Cannon being deployed. Optimus makes the ultimate sacrifice and takes the full blast. Afterwards only his minicon and his matrix are found, but at least earth survives.

programme.title: Transformers: Armada
programme.desc: Remorse : Hot Shot insists they should take vengeance on the Decepticons: Scavenger, with the support of the minicons, reminds him of their true purpose. With Hot Shot's realisation of the right way forward, Jetfire hands over command to him.

programme.title: Transformers: Armada
programme.desc: Depart : With the Autobot ship ready to leave, Hot Shot, supported by the rest of the team, refuse to let the children accompany them. But then the minicons refuse to allow the ship to depart unless the kids are on board.

programme.title: Transformers: Armada
programme.desc: Miracle : As the Axalon chases the Decepticon ship, hundreds of minicons appear. The 'Cons turn back to fight, and the 'Bots seem doomed, but the minicons resurrect Optimus.

programme.title: Transformers: Armada
programme.desc: Puppet : Hot Shot and Red Alert are sucked through a wormhole. The minicons guide the Axalon to their location, where they are all attacked by Nemesis Prime. As the planet breaks up, the 'Cons shoot down the Axalon and escape.

programme.title: Transformers: Armada
programme.desc: Uprising : The 'Bots reach Cybertron to find Megatron (now calling himself Galvatron) already winning the war. The minicons fend off an attack by Unicron, warning of great danger, but Galvatron believes it just an Autobot trick.

programme.title: Transformers: Armada
programme.desc: Dash : While the battle continues, Hot Shot goes to Cybertron to try to convince Galvatron of the impending danger. Thrust's true allegiance and agenda is revealed.

programme.title: Transformers: Armada
programme.desc: Drift : Thrust flees into the depths of Cybertron, pursued by Hot Shot and Wheeljack - and, separately, Starscream, who saves the children from being killed. The children discover the origins of the minicons.

programme.title: Transformers: Armada
programme.desc: Portent : Thrust joins Sideways by passing through a portal deep underground: his pursuers follow and find themselves on Cybertron's moon, which begins to disintegrate. To everyone's horror, Unicron is revealed.

programme.title: Transformers: Armada
programme.desc: Cramp : To convince Galvatron he must ally with Optimus to prevent Unicron taking over the universe, Starscream makes the ultimate sacrifice.

programme.title: Transformers: Armada
programme.desc: Alliance : With the Decepticons and Autobots allied, both armadas engage the planet-sized, transformed Unicron in battle in order to save Cybertron.

programme.title: Transformers: Armada
programme.desc: Union : The only way to defeat Unicron is to wake the minicons inside him and attack from within as well as without. Red Alert and the kids use the portal to travel to Unicron's core.

programme.title: Transformers: Armada
programme.desc: Origin : With the minicons protecting Cybertron and Hot Shot's team attacking Unicron from outside, and Optimus and Galvatron facing Sideways at Unicron's heart, the purpose and meaning behind the endless war is revealed.

programme.title: Transformers: Armada
programme.desc: Mortal Combat : With Unicron seemingly defeated, Galvatron insists on settling things with Optimus, and the fight wakes Unicron again. Galvatron makes the ultimate sacrifice to finally end the threat. Jetfire and Hot Shot return the children to earth.

programme.title: Transformers: Cybertron
programme.desc: Fallen : When Cybertron is threatened by a colossal black hole, Optimus Prime and the Autobots give the order to evacuate the planet. However, a mysterious stranger holds one last hope…

programme.title: Transformers: Cybertron
programme.desc: Haven : With the help of their human friends, the Autobots construct a new HQ on Earth, but will Megatron discover their secret base before it's finished?

programme.title: Transformers: Cybertron
programme.desc: Hidden : The Autobots attempt to blend in by assuming alternate transformation modes suitable for Earth. Meanwhile, the Decepticons engage human military forces, and the Autobots are forced to intervene.

programme.title: Transformers

programme.title: Donal MacIntyre's Murder Files
programme.desc: The Drug Den Murder : Donal MacIntyre talks to DS Julie Mackay about the investigation into the murder of vulnerable Paul Pass, found beaten and stabbed to death in his own home.

programme.title: Donal MacIntyre's Murder Files
programme.desc: The People Trafficking Murder : Donal talks to DCI Clive Driscoll, to find out how his team uncovered a disturbing underworld of modern-day slavery and people trafficking, in an investigation sparked by murder.

programme.title: Donal MacIntyre's Murder Files
programme.desc: Murdered By A 'Friend' : Donal meets DCS Martin Brunning to discover how he cracked the shocking murder of Jolanta Dumciuviene, whose body was found wedged under the mattress of her own bed.

programme.title: Trace of Evil
programme.desc: Triple Murder in Pinyon Pines : The story of 3 innocent victims whose lives were ended violently and abruptly, how the culprits almost got away and how determined detective work and forensic advancements solved the case.

programme.title: Trace of Evil
programme.desc: Deadly Disposal : The story of the disappearance and murder of Jeffrey and Jeanette Navin and how tenacious investigators and extensive forensics eventually solved the mystery and brought their killers to justice.

programme.title: Very Scary People
programme.desc: Rev. Jim Jones: Unholy Massacre (Part 1) : More than 900 Americans died in the jungle in Guyana in November 1978. The man responsible, Jim Jones, has gone down in history as a madman who drove his followers to suicide.

programme.title: Very Scary People
programme.desc: Rev. Jim Jones: Unholy Massacre (Part 2) : More than 900 Americans died in the jungle in Guyana in November 1978. The man responsible, Jim Jones, has gone down in history as a madman who drove his followers to suicide.

programme.title: Very Scary People
programme.desc: NorCal Rapist: Phantom Predator (Part 1) : The NorCal Rapist terrorized women in Northern California over three decades. This episode details the horror of the attacks, and the new forensic science that led to the suspect’s capture.

programme.title: Very Scary People
programme.desc: NorCal Rapist: Phantom Predator (Part 2) : The NorCal Rapist terrorized women in Northern California over three decades. This episode details the horror of the attacks, and the new forensic science that led to the suspect’s capture.

programme.title: Very Scary People
programme.desc: Son of Sam: The Duke of Death (Part 1) : From 1976 to 1977, David Berkowitz terrorized New York City under his creepy self-given moniker: “Son of Sam.” He committed eight shootings, wounding seven people and killing six.

programme.title: Very Scary People
programme.desc: Son of Sam: I Am A Monster (Part 2) : From 1976 to 1977, David Berkowitz terrorized New York City under his creepy self-given moniker: “Son of Sam.” He committed eight shootings, wounding seven people and killing six.

programme.title: Very Scary People
programme.desc: BTK: Bind, Torture, Kill (Part 1) : Four members of a family are brutally murdered in Wichita, Kansas by the “B.T.K.” killer, which stands for Bind, Torture, Kill. He finally makes a mistake decades later.

programme.title: Very Scary People
programme.desc: BTK: The Taunting (Part 2) : Four members of a family are brutally murdered in Wichita, Kansas by the “B.T.K.” killer, which stands for Bind, Torture, Kill. He finally makes a mistake decades later.

programme.title: Very Scary People
programme.desc: The Night Stalker: Summer of Terror (Part 1) : The Summer of 1985, the Night Stalker was on the loose in Los Angeles, and his crimes were vicious, random, and committed in the name of Satan. His victims ranged from toddlers to the elderly.

programme.title: Very Scary People
programme.desc: The Night Stalker: I Will Be Avenged (Part 2) : The Summer of 1985, the Night Stalker was on the loose in Los Angeles, and his crimes were vicious, random, and committed in the name of Satan. His victims ranged from toddlers to the elderly.

programme.title: Donal MacIntyre's Murder Files
programme.desc: Dating App Murder : Donal MacIntyre meets former DI Simon Shuttleworth to discover how Leicester Police captured the murderers of 45-year-old Timothy Smith, found fatally wounded in a crashed car.

programme.title: Donal MacIntyre's Murder Files
programme.desc: Mistress Scorned : Donal meets former Met Detective Inspector Tony Bishop to discover how the fatal poisoning of Lakhvinder Lucky Cheema was solved.

programme.title: Donal MacIntyre's Murder Files
programme.desc: The Arson Murders : Renowned journalist Donal MacIntyre meets Detective Inspector Jim Hodgson of Lincolnshire Police to find out how he and the murder squad solved the brutal killing of Marina Erte.

programme.title: Donal MacIntyre's Murder Files
programme.desc: The Multiple Identity Killer : Renowned crime journalist and Criminologist Donal MacIntyre meets Detective Chief Inspector Andy Guy from Suffolk and Norfolk Major Investigation Team, to discover how he solved the extraordinary double murder of Peter and Sylvia Stuart.

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: Childhood friends and antiques collectors, Mike Wolfe and Frank Fritz, travel the United States looking for rare artifacts and national treasures.

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: Keep Out! : A homeowner opens up his amazing collection of "mantiques;" a Smokey Mountain's property that looks perfect; the guys get a warm welcome from Joe, a lifetime picker whose staggering collection spans over 30 buildings.

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: Childhood friends and antiques collectors, Mike Wolfe and Frank Fritz, travel the United States looking for rare artifacts and national treasures.

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: Leland's Cafe : Mike finds two rare bicycles after Danielle gets a sketchy lead about a collection owned by a reluctant seller; Mike and Frank come bearing a gift when they pay another visit to Leland.

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: Scrappy Go Lucky : In California, a hardcore collector is under pressure from the county to downsize; a hunch leads to a bonanza of vintage cars.

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: Legend of the Lost Indian : Mike and Frank chase a legend that could be a real buried treasure in Springfield, Massachusetts, the birth place of Indian Motorcycles.

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: Catch-32 : Mike and Frank have their work cut out for them on a huge property with more custom 1932 Fords than they have ever seen in one place; Danielle takes on an important military mission.

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: Beetle in a Haystack : A lead on an ultra-rare VW beetle ends up being a true barn find, but it'll take a heavy metal move to bring it home.

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: They Boldly Go : Mike and Frank visit William Shatner, who gives them a very specific list of items he wants; the guys visit a man with an amazing poster collection; the hunt for Shatner's items continue until their job is complete.

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: Civil War Pickings : The Gettysburg Museum asks Mike and Frank to hunt down some hard to find Civil War items on a limited budget.

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: Rock and a Hard Place : Mike and Frank go behind the scenes of a famous tourist attraction for the pick of a lifetime; in Cape Cod, Mass., a collector shuts down deal after deal until his wife steps in.

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: Going Hollywood : Jackie Hollywood unveils his incredible body shop art gallery; Les and Loretta's sprawling warehouses; Danielle hauls a rare but rusted out Lambretta scooter.

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: Haunted Honeyhole : A man's two-story farmhouse that is rumored to be haunted; Dennis' vast collection of rare toys and a pristine set of vintage Beatles bobbleheads.

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: Can't Catch a Break : Mike makes deal after deal; Frank hits a snag with a straight-talking Wisconsin collector who won't move on prices.

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: Picking Superheroes : The guys pick a Pennsylvania warehouse and find a rare comic book; Frank tries to negotiate for a vintage cigarette machine; a ramshackle old house is said to be haunted by a ghost named Pearl.

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: Guys and Dollhouses : A vintage theater marquee; rare opera house relics; Mike gets into a heated negotiation over a Victorian doll house.

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: Good & Evel : Mike and Frank meet a collector who is a huge fan of legendary daredevil Evel Knievel and owns many of the iconic stunt performer's personal items.

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: Louisiana Purchase : Frank spots an alien spaceship emerging from an Airstream trailer; Mike's honest approach wins over a tough-as-nails negotiator; Danielle prepares to unveil her secret renovation project.

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: Backroad Barnstorming : A sprawling Connecticut dairy farm; the guys pick one of the biggest barns they've ever seen; ultra-rare skis for a Model T Ford.

programme.title: Inspector Gadget

programme.title: Inspector Gadget

programme.title: Inspector Gadget

programme.title: Rock Legends
programme.desc: Women Who Rock : In the '60s, artists such as Grace Slick and Janis Joplin, were fronting A-list bands. Garage rock, all girl bands sprang up across the US in the 1960s and were playing rock 'n' roll on their own terms whilst breaking new ground.

programme.title: Rock Legends
programme.desc: Pop Rock : New Wave and post-punk were the successors of the raw nihilism of punk. New Wave was brighter, more pop, synth-heavy and very dance-able.

programme.title: Rock Legends
programme.desc: Jethro Tull : Jethro Tull Named for no apparent reason after an 18th-century British agronomist who invented the machine drill for sowing seed, Jethro Tull has been one of the most commercially successful and eccentric progressive-rock bands.

programme.title: Rock Legends
programme.desc: The Kinks : The Kinks were a key part of the 1960s British Invasion, and their early hits - especially You Really Got Me and All Day and All of the Night - paved the way for the next decade's hard rock.

programme.title: Arthur
programme.desc: The World of Tomorrow/Is There a Doctor in the House? : Since Binky's repeating third grade, he's totally dreading Mr. Ratburn's annual class sleepover at the Science Museum. Arthur and D.W. face the ultimate challenge when Mom gets a bad cold and then gives it to Dad!

programme.title: Arthur
programme.desc: Prunella Sees the Light/Return of the Snowball : For her sleepover with Marina, Prunella redecorates her room. But Marina is blind--will the decorations she can't see offend her, or worse, make her trip? D.W. has been trying to solve the mystery of her snowball's disappearance.

programme.title: Arthur
programme.desc: April 9th : April 9th is a normal day until a fire destroys the teacher's lounge and forces Lakewood Elementary to close. This unexpected event finds creates a wide range of emotional reactions, for Arthur, his friends and teachers, and the community.

programme.title: Arthur
programme.desc: Three's a Crowd/A is for Angry : Prunella's loves doing yoga with her mom, but when her best friend joins them, will she be able to share her time? When Arthur decides to take on The Brain at a checkers competition, everyone rallies behind the underdog.

programme.title: Arthur
programme.desc: The "A" Team/Emily Swallows a Horse : Francine and Brain are the best players on the soccer team, and they wish their teammates could take the game a bit more seriously. And then Emily really wants the sparkly ball D.W. just found, so she tells a little white lie about it.

programme.title: Arthur
programme.desc: D.W. Beats All/Buster the Myth Maker : After the Tibbles get a set of drums to play at the music festival, D.W. is determined to get an even bigger and louder one. Then, Buster is always telling the most incredible stories, but now he claims there is a tiger in the state forest.

programme.title: Arthur
programme.desc: Binky Goes Nuts/Breezy Listening Blues : When Binky discovers that he's allergic to peanuts, he has so many questions, but learns that the best way not to go nuts is to be well informed and to understand his allergy. Much to his horror, Brain gets a "B-" on a test.

programme.title: Arthur
programme.desc: Happy Anniversary : Arthur's parents have been married for 10 years and it's time to celebrate! But the festivities are cut short when the van breaks down, stranding the whole family. Will the Reads miss their fancy dinner reservation?

programme.title: Arthur
programme.desc: The Squirrels/Fern and Persimmony Glitchet : After watching the classic horror movie, "The Squirrels," Arthur and his friends are scared to step out into the playground, and everywhere else! Fern's story about perfect Felicity Bonchance is thought perfectly boring by her friends.

programme.title: Arthur
programme.desc: Desert Island Dish/The Secret About Secrets : When Mr. Ratburn challenges the class to find the perfect food for surviving on a desert island, everyone picks potato chips or ice cream! D.W. is told a secret and quickly learns that keeping one is a lot harder than she thought.

programme.title: Arthur
programme.desc: Feeling Flush/Family Fortune : During a drought, Francine bets Arthur that her family can use less water than his. The TV show, Treasure Caravan, is coming to Elwood City! Arthur and D.W. are convinced they'll find treasures that will make them rich and famous.

programme.title: Arthur
programme.desc: D.W. Aims High/Flaw and Order : D.W. wants to be the first person to set foot on Mars! But what if scary purple aliens eat her? Who's responsible for cracking Dad's cake platter? DUN-DUN! All the evidence points to Arthur!

programme.title: Arthur
programme.desc: The Curse of the Grebes/Arthur Changes Gears : The Elwood City Grebes haven't won the Baseball Championship since 1918. But with the addition of three players, the title is finally within reach. Arthur finally saves enough money to buy the bike of his dreams!

programme.title: Arthur
programme.desc: Unfinished/D.W., Bossy Boots : Arthur is completely riveted by a book and can't wait to see how it ends. But the last few pages are missing! Now what? For D.W., there's nothing better than getting her own way--that is, until all her friends stop playing with her.

programme.title: Arthur
programme.desc: Binky Vs. Binky/Operation: DW! : Binky may be tough and strong, but when it comes to sports, he always seems to choke. D.W. is having trouble hearing and needs an ear operation. Is it okay to be just a little bit scared?

programme.title: Arthur
programme.desc: Do You Speak George?/World Girls : Everyone at school is speaking their own made-up language, and George can't make sense of what anyone is saying. And it's the grand opening of World Girl World, which sells dolls from every country, and every girl in town is thrilled!

programme.title: Arthur
programme.desc: What's Cooking?/Buster's Special Delivery : Celebrity chef Ming Tsai is judging Lakewood Elementary's first-ever cooking contest, and Arthur thinks he has a shot at winning. Then, Buster volunteers to deliver the school mail and finds out that his new job is actually hard work!

programme.title: Arthur
programme.desc: Swept Away/Germophobia : Arthur, D.W. and Buster are spending a few days at the beach. Can they save their sandcastle from the ocean tides? Buster's friends have had enough of his sloppy habits, so they band together to educate him on the realities of bacteria.

programme.title: Arthur
programme.desc: Arthur Sells Out/Mind Your Manners : To earn the money for a new video game, Arthur decides to sell his old toys through his school's Web site. The Tibble Twins want to take Grandmother out to dinner, but she'd rather stay home. Is it because of their terrible table manners?

programme.title: Arthur
programme.desc: Buenas Noches, Vicita/Prunella Packs It In : Vicita Molina has lost her favorite bedtime book – can Arthur help her re-create it? Prunella is already starting to think about college! Will she crack under the heavy load or will she learn to relax and do the things she actually enjoys?

programme.title: Arthur
programme.desc: Phony Fern/Brain's Shocking Secret : When Fern's parents give her a cell phone for emergencies, she soon becomes hooked on it. Brain is the smartest kid in class. Everyone knows that! What they don't know is that he was kept back in Kindergarten. Will Binky spill the beans?

programme.title: Arthur
programme.desc: Baby Kate and the Imaginary Mystery/Strangers on a Train : Nadine, D.W.'s imaginary friend is missing. Sue Ellen can't wait to travel on an old-fashioned train, but once onboard, she discovers that the train is not as spectacular as she had hoped–until she finds a mysterious diary.

programme.title: Arthur
programme.desc: The Making of Arthur/Dancing Fools : When Matt Damon puts out a call for homemade videos for his TV show, he sets off a frantic rush as Arthur and his gang film their lives. Mrs. Molina is a teaching a dance class for kids. Will Francine and George be the next Fred and Ginger?

programme.title: Arthur
programme.desc: Hic or Treat/Mr. Alwaysright : D.W. gets a case of the hiccups that just won't go away. Will she have them for the rest of her life and set the world record? It seems that Brain is always right about everything and it's really starting to get on Buster's nerves.

programme.title: Arthur
programme.desc: Francine's Pilfered Paper/Buster Gets Real : When Francine has a big paper over Thanksgiving, she copies from a website. There's nothing wrong with that, is there? Everyone loves the new Top Supermarket reality series on TV, except Arthur. Will it end his friendship with Buster?

programme.title: Arthur
programme.desc: D.W. on Ice/Spoiled Rotten! : D.W. tells her friends that she's a fantastic skater, but she can barely stand on ice! With a skating party coming up, how will she face everyone and tell them the truth? Accused of being spoiled, Muffy sets out to prove her friends wrong.

programme.title: Arthur
programme.desc: Big Brother Binky, Parts I&II : Binky's family has decided to adopt a little girl from China. The thought of a baby sister makes Binky happy, until he realized there are some changes in store. It’s a lot harder than he thought, but it has its rewards too.

programme.title: Arthur
programme.desc: Is That Kosher/Never Never Never : Francine's convinced that she can fast on Yom Kippur, but what about Arthur’s pizza party? D.W learns that giving gifts isn't the only way of showing you care. Featuring the voice of Joan Rivers.

programme.title: Arthur
programme.desc: Room to Ride/The Frensky Family Fiasco : With Lance Armstrong’s support, Binky and his friends take to the streets to convince residents to vote for new bike safety lanes. Francine wants the Frenskys to be closer, but a weekly Family Night turns out to be harder than expected.

programme.title: Larry Crowne
programme.desc: Unemployed after a round of corporate downsizing, a middle-aged man (Tom Hanks) enrolls in college and meets a teacher (Julia Roberts) who has lost her passion for her job and her husband.

programme.title: Uncle Drew
programme.desc: Uncle Drew recruits a squad of older basketball players to return to the court to compete in a tournament.

programme.title: Mad Money
programme.desc: Three women (Diane Keaton, Queen Latifah, Katie Holmes) conspire to steal a pile of cash that the Federal Reserve Bank has earmarked for destruction.

programme.title: Get a Job
programme.desc: A young man (Miles Teller) and his girlfriend (Anna Kendrick) struggle to find desirable employment after graduating from college.

programme.title: Rapture-Palooza
programme.desc: Left behind after the Rapture, a young woman (Anna Kendrick) and her boyfriend (John Francis Daley) set out to prevent the Antichrist (Craig Robinson) from taking her as his unholy bride.

programme.title: Safety Not Guaranteed
programme.desc: A disaffected magazine intern (Aubrey Plaza) befriends an unusual guy (Mark Duplass), who is looking for a partner to accompany him on a trip back through time.

programme.title: National Lampoon's Van Wilder
programme.desc: An underachieving collegian (Ryan Reynolds) needs money to stay in school after his father (Tim Matheson) cuts off his funds.

programme.title: Soul Men
programme.desc: Old animosities re-emerge when two estranged singers (Samuel L. Jackson, Bernie Mac) travel cross-country to perform in a tribute concert for their late band leader.

programme.title: Good Luck Chuck
programme.desc: After meeting the woman of his dreams, a dentist must find a way to break a curse that causes each of his ex-lovers to find true love with her next boyfriend.

programme.title: Godsend
programme.desc: A scientist (Robert De Niro) clones a couple's (Greg Kinnear, Rebecca Romijn-Stamos) dead son, but the boy behaves strangely after his eighth birthday.

programme.title: The Eye
programme.desc: Following a double corneal transplant, a concert violinist (Jessica Alba) perceives frightening images of a world that only she can see.

programme.title: Mayday: Air Disaster
programme.desc: Hanging by a Thread : Aloha Airlines Flight 243 loses part of its roof of the front fuselage before landing safely at Kahului, Maui.

programme.title: Mayday: Air Disaster

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: Dude Perfect : On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, trick shot superstars Dude Perfect joins Rob, Sterling, and Chanel to enjoy some "Dudebrations", witness the pain of "Dud Perfect," and learn about the dangers of "Bad Garretts."

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: Charlotte Mckinney : On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, model and actress Charlotte Mckinney joins Rob, Sterling, and Chanel to tell some "Dirty Secrets", taste some "All Natural Beef" and clench for the category "Spike My Butt"."

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: Redfoo : On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Grammy-nominated recording artist Redfoo joins Rob, Stee-Lo and Chanel to talk about the " Legends Of Campfoo", going "Lights Out" and learn what it means to get "Party Rock'd".

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: Metta World Peace : On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, basketball great Metta World Peace joins Rob, Sterling, and Chanel to talk about what it means to play "Metta Ball," having a job when you're "Here For The Discount,"

programme.desc: Chanel and Sterling XXX : On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Rob, Chanel and Sterling spot some "Man Dolphins", hit some red "Bullseyes" and get wet in the category "Dammmmp Daniel."

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: Bubba Wallace : On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, NASCAR's Bubba Wallace sits with Rob, Stee-lo and Chanel to drive fast and hard in "Trading Paint," play some "Next Level Games" and get into some road rage throwdowns in "Street Heat."

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: Chanel and Sterling XXXI : On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Rob, Sterling, and Chanel go "Flame Dumb," test out their hand skills in "Snatch Masters," and slow-mo man's best friend in "Goooooooddddd Boooooooyyyyy."

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: T-Pain : On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Grammy-winning rapper and producer T-Pain joins Rob, Sterling, and Chanel to sweeten the sound of people's slams in "T-Pain Your Pain", talk about "Hard 180s"

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: Chanel and Sterling XXXII : On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Rob, Chanel and Sterling enjoy some "White Whines", attend an "Animals Anonymous" meeting and take a trip to the most dangerous suburb in the country "Slamburbia."

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: Baddie Winkle : On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Rob, Chanel, and Sterling are joined by the coolest granny in the game, Baddie Winkle, who teaches us how to stay young in "Fountain of Baddie,"

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: Chanel and Sterling XXXIII : On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Rob, Chanel and Sterling see the secret skills it takes to be an "Undercover Badass," find a new way of "Gettin' Paid" and learn that some things are simply "Unforgivable."

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: DeMarcus Ware & Von Miller : On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Super Bowl 50 Champs DeMarcus Ware and Von Miller join Rob and the crew to try out for the "Swat Team," round up some "Attack Chickens," and file to the IRS to become "Fart Tax Exempt."

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: Chanel and Sterling XXXIV : On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Rob, Chanel and Sterling take the "Running Man Challenge," explore the fear known as "Crap-nophobia" and learn what it means to be "Saved To Death."

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: Wanda Sykes : On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, comedy icon Wanda Sykes joins Rob, Sterling, and Chanel to talk about what it means to have "Unpresidential Nipples," doling out "Momforcement," and the first-ever "Wandamania."

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: Chanel and Sterling XXXV : On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Rob, Sterling, and Chanel pay homage to some "Legendary Assists," bust up some public makeouts with "PDA Police," and find out why babies are nothing more than "Tiny People, Tiny Brains."

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: Dillon Francis : On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Rob, Sterling, and Chanel hang out with artist/producer Dillon Francis to talk some "Wack Smack," learn how to party correctly in "They Did It Right"

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: Dave England : On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Jackass' Dave England shows Rob, Chanel, and Sterling what it takes to inspire a generation of "Poo Pros," gets careless with some "Bad Daddies" and the agony of getting "Butt Hurt."

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: Bryan Callen & Brendan Schaub : On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, the hosts of The Fighter and The Kid podcast, Bryan Callen and Brendan Schaub, join Rob, Chanel, and Sterling to talk about other "Fighters and Funny People,"

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: Chanel and Sterling XXXVI : On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Rob, Chanel and Sterling look for some "Everyday Peens", watch some videos get "Dog Bombed" and check out some people who have serious "Motor Skills".

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: Jerry Springer : Tonight on an all-new Ridiculousness, the legendary television host Jerry Springer joins Rob, Sterling and Chanel to chant "Jerry! Jerry! Jerry!", watch some "Beastdowns" and post some photos on "Injurgram."

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: Chanel and Sterling XXXVII : On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Rob shows Chanel and Sterling the animal mastery of "Beast Lords," the tragedy of having a "Craptastrophe" and the dangers of flying "Foot Bombs."

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: Jolene Van Vugt : On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, stunt person and Nitro Circus star Jolene Van Vugt stops by to get destructive with "Smash Happy," capture the perfect monkey moments in "Right Place, Right Monkey,"

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: Chanel and Sterling XXXVIII : On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Rob, Chanel and Sterling discuss the drunk ingenuity of "Drinkovators", explore the bizarre "Planet Of The Vapes" and test their palates for destruction in the "Taste Of Death".

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: Chanel and Sterling XXXIX : On the Season 9 Premiere of Ridiculousness, Rob, Chanel and Steelo get CROPPED OUT, take a trip to their local HELL MART and enjoy some delicious PUMPKIN SPICE.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: Jamie Bestwick : On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Rob, Steelo, and Chanel are joined by BMX legend Jamie Bestwick to experience some serious VERT HURT, keep kids in their place with YOUTH SLAYERS and get over-caffeinated with ROTHROCKED.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: Chanel and Sterling XL : On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Rob, Chanel and Steelo celebrate a RUSSIAN THANKSGIVING, feel the wrath of some TEENY MEANIES and plug in with VIRTUAL RETIREMENT.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: Clinton Sparks : Music producer Clinton Sparks teaches Rob, Chanel, and Steelo how to make budget beats with SPARKS OF GENIUS, get cultured with some MASSHOLES, and cause some serious mom damage with MAMA TRAUMA.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: Chanel and Sterling XLI : On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Rob, Chanel, and Steelo attend a RUSSIAN TALENT SHOW, check out some nasty KID MARKS, and discover that THE WORLD'S YOUR WEAPON.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: Danger Ehren : On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Jackass legend Danger Ehren teaches Rob, Steelo and Chanel the pain of GETTING DONKEY'D, how to avoid DENTAL DANGER and get adorable with some WHISKEY PETS.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: Chanel and Sterling XLII : On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Rob, Chanel and Steelo learn a new game called TRAFFIC TAG, receive some DICK TIPS and things get messy when they POP THE MAN-PAGNE.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: Steve Wilkos : On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, talkshow host Steve Wilkos joins Rob, Chanel and Steelo to check out some SURPRISE TITTIES, call STEVECURITY and watch the HIGHEST RATED CATEGORY EVER.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: Chanel and Sterling XLIII : On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Rob, Chanel and Steelo enter the SNACK ZONE, learn the dangers of hiring BUDGET BABYSITTERS and root on reckless golf cart drivers in COUNTRY CLUB DRIFT.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: Michael Crossland : On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, motivational speaker Michael Crossland joins Rob, Steelo and Chanel to teach us the CROSSLAND METHOD, show us what it means when your dog is CROSS-BRED, and visit the FIELD OF NIGHTMARES.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: Teyana Taylor : On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Teyana Taylor joins Rob, Steelo and Chanel to pay tribute to KID NAPPERS, and tell us about BIRTHDAY ASSASSINS, and what it's like to be in a LUST BUBBLE.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: Chanel and Sterling XLIV : On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Rob, Chanel and Steelo dive head first into some DEAD POOLS, go into CARROT SHOCK and learn a valuable life lesson that EVERYTHING FARTS.

programme.desc: Jungle Terminator : Extreme fishing series. Jeremy investigates three mysterious deaths in three South American countries on his most remote mission to date.

programme.title: The Island with Bear Grylls
programme.desc: Episode 5 : After Patrick's fall, the rest of the group face a terrifying ordeal trying to escape the oncoming sea. Back in camp, the men have been dominating hunting so far - but Tilly decides to venture into the jungle in search of prey.

programme.title: The Island with Bear Grylls
programme.desc: Episode 6 : The Islanders are barely managing to survive and some of the men’s bodies are starting to fail them. The women continue to look for food and Simon leads a hunt into the jungle for the most dangerous predator on the island: the caiman crocodile.

programme.title: The Island with Bear Grylls
programme.desc: Episode 7 - Surviving the Island : In this special episode of The Island with Bear Grylls, Bear takes an in-depth look at how the castaways survived.

programme.title: Shipping Wars
programme.desc: Land, Sea and the Tiki : It's sink or swim for Natasha as she tries to deliver two ultra-rare amphibious cars to the swamps of Louisiana. And out in a desert oasis, Tamara needs to transport a huge tiki hut bar to a tiki-fanatic.

programme.title: Shipping Wars
programme.desc: Shipping Wars: Pilot : The transporters compete for some unique shipments going cross-country as a 4,000 lbs., 22-foot steel horse and an oversized 7-foot-long Venus Flytrap come up for bid.

programme.title: Shipping Wars
programme.desc: Double Down and Bean Town : When shipments hit the auction block, the Bawcoms score a shipment for a 35-foot freshwater boat while Roy gets stuck transporting an old English phone booth after he tries to teach Jarrett a lesson.

programme.title: Shipping Wars
programme.desc: Bullship : When livestock hits the uShip auction, Jennifer makes her move and wins a haul of two bucking bulls, while Marc gets a fragile experimental aircraft. When this experienced cowgirl picks up the bulls, she finds them meaner than she expected.

programme.title: Shipping Wars
programme.desc: Cash for Tanks : After Marc battles it out with the other transporters, he wins a load of two Military tanks headed across the country and Roy lands a mint condition Model A being shipped from one collector to another.

programme.title: Shipping Wars
programme.desc: Pain in the Caboose : When it comes to the biggest and baddest loads, Marc can't help but throw his hat in the ring. Fighting off Scott and Susie, he lands the job hauling a 1928 train caboose. When he arrives, Marc finds more of a remodel project than a shipment.

programme.title: Shipping Wars
programme.desc: Camel in Tow : Jennifer uses her experience transporting livestock to win a camel shipment from Oklahoma to Vermont. Between getting lost, stopping to keep her cargo fed, and cleaning up the camel spit, Jennifer gets way behind schedule.

programme.title: Shipping Wars
programme.desc: Tavern on the Greenbacks : Roy heads back into New York City when he outbids the other transporters for a job moving a catering food truck from the city's famous restaurant, Tavern on the Green.

programme.title: Shipping Wars
programme.desc: Jennifer's Arch : Jennifer may have taken her livestock specialty too far when she tops the transporters in an auction to ship a number of small animals. Between the smell, the constant feedings, and the never-ending squeals, it may be the last run Jennifer makes.

programme.title: Shipping Wars
programme.desc: Baja or Bust : Marc is headed to Mexico when he wins an auction to ship a $100,000 Baja 1000 Trophy Truck. Leaving from Colorado, Marc must protect his precious cargo, and make sure it arrives without delay in time for the start of the famous race.

programme.title: Shipping Wars
programme.desc: May the Ship Be With You : Roy lands the shipment of his dreams when he gets to haul some large one-of-a-kind props from his favorite sci-fi movie. But when he is cut off by another trucker on the highway, he's afraid it may have damaged these priceless movie artifacts.

programme.title: Shipping Wars
programme.desc: Two Halves of the Same Willie : "Handyman" Roy gets in a heap of trouble after he sees a giant Willie Mays sculpture in half while "Cowgirl" Jennifer deals with a sobbing customer who is sad to see his prized possession go.

programme.title: Modern Marvels
programme.desc: The Erie Canal : Begun in 1817, the Erie Canal was an engineering wonder of 363 miles of water highway linking the western frontier to the Atlantic seaboard; it took eight years to construct and thousands of hours of brutal labor.

programme.title: Modern Marvels
programme.desc: The Panama Canal : The construction of the 51-mile canal that took ten years to build and employed over 40,000 workers, 6,000 of whom died of yellow fever, malaria, and other horrors; an earlier, nine-year attempt by the French ended in failure and cost 20,000 lives.

programme.title: Modern Marvels
programme.desc: Alaskan Fishing : A large factory-fishing boat hunts down, catches and processes 300 tons of Alaskan pollock each day in the Bering Sea; the crew reveals the inner workings of one of the most sophisticated and complex vessels afloat.

programme.title: Modern Marvels
programme.desc: Most Dangerous : The most dangerous snakes, sports, weather events; America's most dangerous volcano; tornado hazards; base jumping.

programme.title: Modern Marvels
programme.desc: Most Shocking : It strikes without warning and kills in an instant; we fear its might even as we use it to save a life; explore the electric shock in its numerous forms.

programme.title: Modern Marvels
programme.desc: The Erie Canal : Begun in 1817, the Erie Canal was an engineering wonder of 363 miles of water highway linking the western frontier to the Atlantic seaboard; it took eight years to construct and thousands of hours of brutal labor.

programme.title: Modern Marvels
programme.desc: The Panama Canal : The construction of the 51-mile canal that took ten years to build and employed over 40,000 workers, 6,000 of whom died of yellow fever, malaria, and other horrors; an earlier, nine-year attempt by the French ended in failure and cost 20,000 lives.

programme.title: Modern Marvels
programme.desc: Alaskan Fishing : A large factory-fishing boat hunts down, catches and processes 300 tons of Alaskan pollock each day in the Bering Sea; the crew reveals the inner workings of one of the most sophisticated and complex vessels afloat.

programme.title: Modern Marvels
programme.desc: The Alaskan Oil Pipeline : In 1973, a desperate America, starved by an OPEC embargo, began construction on an 800 mile lifeline for its oil hunger; study the technological triumph of the Alaskan oil pipeline built over mountains and tundra, where temperatures drop below zero.

programme.title: Modern Marvels
programme.desc: Engineering Disasters of the '70s : The sinking of the Edmund Fitzgerald; the Buffalo Creek Dam disaster; the explosion of a supertanker in Los Angeles Harbor.

programme.title: Modern Marvels
programme.desc: '70s Tech : The 1970s were a decade of excess; dust off your mirror ball, put on your leisure suit, and rediscover the gadgets of the era; Play PONG with its inventor and learn how this simple game created a billion dollar empire.

programme.title: Modern Marvels
programme.desc: Super Hot : Pyroman the life-size mannequin is exposed to more than 1,000 degrees F; steel workers suit up to beat refinery heat; coffee makers and hair dryers malfunction at Underwriters Laboratories; a friction lab tests aircraft and race-car brakes.

programme.title: Modern Marvels
programme.desc: Aluminum : A visit to a rolling mill where aluminum skins for jets are made; aluminum is used to make reflective mirrors for telescopes at NASA; the process of making aluminum foil; why aluminum baseball bats are better than wood.

programme.title: Modern Marvels
programme.desc: Battle Ready : From elaborate elite training facilities to GPS-guided air drops, to revolutionary high-tech tents and fire-retardant uniforms, the episode explores the science and technology of building, operating and protecting a base in a war zone.

programme.title: Modern Marvels
programme.desc: Iron : How iron mined in Minnesota is made into steel; iron weapons revolutionize warfare; military metallurgists customize weapons and demonstrate their firepower; iron magnets.

programme.title: Modern Marvels
programme.desc: Salt Mines : Digging up salt mining's history, from the "white gold" on the table to the oceanic and underground deposits whence it came; today people take salt for granted, but most life depends on it.

programme.title: Modern Marvels
programme.desc: Salt : Salt is a versatile substance with 14,000 known uses; visiting a salt mine under Lake Erie; an evaporation facility harvests ocean salt near San Francisco; a Florida restaurant offers 40 varieties of salt.

programme.title: Firefighting!
programme.desc: The Arson Detectives : The work of arson detectives, from a suspicious fire in Houston to the motives behind recent church fires.

programme.title: Firefighting!
programme.desc: Containing the Demon : How science and technology have changed firefighting; some of the worst fire disasters in American history.

programme.title: Monsters vs. Aliens
programme.desc: Ginormicat!/My Monster, My Master : A stray kitten makes its way onto the base and accidently obtains Susan's ginormica powers! Sta'abi recruits Bob to teach her the "Art of Combat", after she witnesses him winning Link's new video game.

programme.title: Monsters vs. Aliens
programme.desc: This Ball Must Be Dodged/It Spoke With Authority : Monger gathers everyone for his favorite combat training exercise-a game of "no rules" dodge ball. Dr. Cockroach creates a special spray to give the President more authority.

programme.title: Monsters vs. Aliens
programme.desc: Debtor Alive!/The Grade that Wouldn't Pass! : The monsters start borrowing from Sqweep's allowance, but their spending spree soon comes to a halt when another alien planet arrives. After Dr. C messes with Sqweep's Earth Studies project, the little alien receives a Zrub--the lowest possible grade.

programme.title: Pig Goat Banana Cricket
programme.desc: Total Bananarchy : Pig wishes to the President for his birthday, but causes mayhem. Banana recruits Shragger as his bodyguard. Goat builds a sculpture for Pig's birthday. Cricket flees to Mars for a more organized society.

programme.title: Pig Goat Banana Cricket
programme.desc: Angry Old Raisin : Pig wreaks havoc at his elderly neighbor's house. Goat accidentally sends a bad email to the President. Banana has to perform in his Forest Ranger talent show. Cricket wants to impress Dr. Eggplant Face.

programme.title: Pig Goat Banana Cricket
programme.desc: Cow Duck Avocado Mantis : Pig wants to be a famous belt in an action movie. Goat is discovered by a movie director. Banana has to replace his hero on a hit television show. Cricket thinks he can make a movie all by himself.

programme.title: Pig Goat Banana Cricket
programme.desc: It's Time to Slumber Party : Pig can't find anybody to have a slumber party with him. Goat joins the armed forces in order to get a VIP concert experience. Banana takes up news casting as a quick way to become famous. Cricket has to stop picking his nose.

programme.title: Pig Goat Banana Cricket
programme.desc: Secret Origins: Special Edition : How did the gang become roommates? They each tell the origin story in the form of a high school rebel comedy, a space adventure, an old fairy tale, and whatever is in Banana's imagination.

programme.title: Pig Goat Banana Cricket
programme.desc: Moby Woof : Pig competes to become the next Picklemart mascot. Banana asks the sun to go away so he can sleep. Cricket visits each of his friends' dreams to ask them for a gift. Goat meets the world's biggest dog at the circus.

programme.title: Pig Goat Banana Cricket
programme.desc: Prince Mermeow Moves In : Prince Mermeow moves into the treehouse. He banishes Pig to the North Pole, forces Banana to go spend a night in the woods, makes Cricket go to a public pool, and tricks Goat into making her room better for him.

programme.title: Pig Goat Banana Cricket
programme.desc: Gold Rush : Banana searches for gold with his friends. Pig uses dancing shoes on a dancing date. Goat struggles to cross a busy street. Cricket loses his butt after turning it into gold.

programme.title: Pig Goat Banana Cricket
programme.desc: The Mud Munchkins Must be Crazy : Pig needs to find a place where his shopping cart family is accepted. Cricket needs to go to the bathroom in a clean environment. Goat loses her thermos to mud munchkins. Banana makes real life imitate video games.

programme.title: Pig Goat Banana Cricket
programme.desc: King of TV : Pig and Angry Old Raisin try to get back the TV remote. Goat has to cross a road toll. Banana befriends a train full of hobos. Cricket takes his new robot out to dinner before using her to obtain the remote.

programme.title: Pig Goat Banana Cricket
programme.desc: Heat Wave : Pig wants to have a pool party. Goat gets confused for a secret agent. Banana beats the heat by stealing an ice cream truck. Cricket gets trapped in a cave.

programme.title: Pig Goat Banana Cricket
programme.desc: Charm School : Pig needs to learn some manners. Goat wants to protect her favorite city landmark. Banana becomes a world-famous stuntman. Cricket wants to get Pig back to his old ways.

programme.title: Pig Goat Banana Cricket
programme.desc: Road Trippin' : On a road trip to go see the Pretty Panda at the zoo, Goat stops at a concert, Pig stops at a trampoline theme park, Banana has to do jail time, and Cricket has to get him back.

programme.title: Pig Goat Banana Cricket
programme.desc: Love Boat : The gang takes a cruise vacation. Cricket shows off his discount ticket. Pig wants more room in his body to eat pickles. Banana plays matchmaker. Goat has to cover for her mistake.

programme.title: Pig Goat Banana Cricket
programme.desc: Hotel It on the Mountain : The roommates open a hotel. Pig is the bellboy, Goat is the chef, Banana is the hotel manager, and Cricket is the maid.

programme.title: Pig Goat Banana Cricket
programme.desc: It's One Like Con Con : At Convention Con, Pig's movie is debuting. Banana finds a way to make money on comics. Cricket wants an elusive toy. Goat seeks help to with the costume contest.

programme.title: Pig Goat Banana Cricket
programme.desc: Jimmy Ron Cricket : Pig goes on a tour of the Picklemart. Banana finds his old ranger friend. Cricket's brother escapes from prison. Goat's idol pays her a visit.

programme.title: Pig Goat Banana Cricket
programme.desc: Steak Bus : Pig directs a commercial for the Picklemart. Banana attempts to eat the perfect steak. Cricket needs to get his super suit dry cleaned. Goat is recruited to be a famous wrestler.

programme.title: Pig Goat Banana Cricket
programme.desc: Flowers for Burgerstein : Banana reunites with his musical family. Pig takes Angry Old Raisin to a dog show. Goat falls in love with the repair man. Cricket makes Burgerstein smart.

programme.title: Pig Goat Banana Cricket
programme.desc: The Goofy Turkey Zone : Cricket goes back in time to date Goat. Goat wishes to be a great musician. Banana needs to win a video game competition. Pig possesses Angry Old Raisin's scooter.

programme.title: Pig Goat Banana Cricket
programme.desc: Witness Protection Program : The gang must go in disguise to hide from a dangerous criminal: Pig as a professor, Goat as sbusinesswoman, Banana as a plumber, and Cricket as a baby.

programme.title: Pig Goat Banana Cricket
programme.desc: Where Do Pickles Come From : Goat wants to build a new entertainment center. Cricket wants to impress Goat by being a vigilante. Banana becomes an Internet celebrity. Pig finds out where pickles come from.

programme.title: Pig Goat Banana Cricket
programme.desc: Ding A Ling Bros Circus : Our gang helps save a failing circus. Goat beautifies the oddities, Banana rigs the midway, Pig starts a flea circus, and Cricket trains the animals.

programme.title: Pig Goat Banana Cricket
programme.desc: Hospital Time : The gang needs to get to the hospital to eat the world's best mashed potatoes. Banana plays a betting game, Pig does a surgery with Angry Old Raisin, Goat fixes Tony Towel, and Cricket makes himself sick.

programme.title: Sanjay and Craig
programme.desc: Brett Venom, M.D. / Laughquake : Sanjay and Craig infiltrate the hospital to see the world’s first butt transplant. Sanjay and Craig go on a quest to find the ultimate laugh.

programme.title: Sanjay and Craig
programme.desc: Maximum Denis / Dog Wave : The boys go undercover to defend their video game dominance at the Frycade. Sanjay and Craig decide to get a dog but end up with 100 dogs.

programme.title: Sanjay and Craig
programme.desc: Heightmare / Be Like Tufflips : Sanjay is finally big enough to go on the scariest carnival ride, but can he survive it? Sanjay dresses like Remington Tufflips and is mistaken for his hero.

programme.title: Sanjay and Craig
programme.desc: Stinkboy / Wolfie : Sanjay runs away to live in the sewer when Craig can’t handle his stench. Hector’s sudden fascination with wolves gets on Sanjay and Craig’s nerves.

programme.title: Sanjay and Craig
programme.desc: Traffical Island / Partybot : The kids turn against Sanjay when he maroons them all on a highway median. Sanjay and Craig find an old robot and become party animals.

programme.title: Sanjay and Craig
programme.desc: The Giving G / Release the Craigan : An amazing discovery at the junkyard causes trouble in the neighborhood. Craig steals Megan's identity and becomes a pageant queen.

programme.title: Ink Master
programme.desc: Ink Master Rep Your Region : The artists tattoo their home states and face blind critiques by the judges, a competitor makes a drastic choice, and patriotic tattoos decide someone's fate in the Face Off.

programme.title: Ink Master
programme.desc: Ink Master Clash of the Collages : The South aims to unify and rebound when the teams are tasked with a postcard mural on the side of a bus, and a compass rose elimination tattoo includes a game-changing twist.

programme.title: Ink Master
programme.desc: Ink Master Teamwork Makes the Dream Work : Teams must unify or die in a two-day tattoo marathon that's all about collaboration, then the losers fight for survival with full-bodied American traditional fairy tattoos.

programme.title: Ink Master
programme.desc: Ink Master There Can Only Be One : Working solo to test their precision, the artists must create mural designs using only staples, then tattoo portraits of senior citizens.

programme.title: Ink Master
programme.desc: Ink Master Compose Yourself : The artists create one-of-a-kind designs on protective headgear in the Flash Challenge, and composition is key for a daunting elimination tattoo featuring Japanese cranes.

programme.title: Ink Master
programme.desc: Ink Master Race to the Finish : Five artists must tattoo a subject and style chosen by their competitors in an elimination challenge, followed by a 13-hour tattooing marathon to send a second artist home.

programme.title: Ink Master
programme.desc: Fresh Meat : With a chance to win $100,000 and the title of Ink Master, 10 of the world's best tattoo artists put their skills to the test.

programme.title: Ink Master
programme.desc: Botched Head Tattoo : Heather challenges the judges' critiques, a head tattoo becomes a medical emergency, and Ton Jones joins the panel as a guest judge.

programme.title: Ink Master
programme.desc: Pasties and a Cameltoe : The artists test their shading skills on naked female canvases during the Flash Challenge, Al rubs the other artists the wrong way, and one more artist is sent home.

programme.title: Ink Master
programme.desc: Ink Disaster Piece : The artists test their technical precision skills, a photo realism tattoo turns disastrous for one artist, and Inked Magazine's Todd Weinberger serves as a guest judge.

programme.title: Ink Master
programme.desc: Game On : The artists test their color skills designing pieces for canvases with prosthetic limbs, and acclaimed tattoo artist Scott Campbell joins the panel as a guest judge.

programme.title: Ink Master
programme.desc: Permanent Mistakes : A surprise Flash Challenge tattoo sparks panic in the shop, the artists struggle through a pinup Elimination Tattoo, and NBA star Chris Birdman Andersen is the guest judge.

programme.title: Ink Master
programme.desc: Picture Imperfect : Lettering skills are put to the test during a graffiti flash challenge, and the portrait elimination tattoo leaves the four remaining artists with no room for error.

programme.title: Ink Master
programme.desc: Ink Master Revealed : The final artists are given a 12-hour master canvas challenge playing to their favorite styles, and an Ink Master is chosen.

programme.title: Ink Master
programme.desc: Tattooing The Dead : The artists head to the morgue to face off in their first Flash Challenge, and tattoo virgins experience their first tastes of ink during the Elimination Tattoo.

programme.title: Ink Master
programme.desc: Semi-Nude 911 : The artists test their ingenuity by camouflaging models, a medical emergency threatens the future of one competitor, and NFL star Terrell Suggs joins as a guest judge.

programme.title: Ink Master
programme.desc: The 80-Year-Old Virgin : The artists test their line skills in the barbershop, military veterans sit in for an American classic style Elimination Tattoo, and tattoo legend Richard Stell guest judges.

programme.title: Ink Master
programme.desc: Tattoo Her What? : The artists face off in a three-round Flash Challenge, a canvas asks for a tattoo with a unique placement, and NBA star Matt Barnes joins as a guest judge.

programme.title: Ink Master
programme.desc: Trick or Freak : Canvases get tattoos inside of their mouths in the Flash Challenge, the artists design horror-themed tattoos for their canvases, and a contestant faces a medical emergency.

programme.title: Ink Master
programme.desc: Half Naked and Fully Loaded : The artists etch detailed designs into firearms, and a pinup Elimination Tattoo proves disastrous for some of the contestants.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Corking the Hole : A juvenile name and bad reputation threaten the Fort Bragg-adjacent bar Cliques, and Jon will have to put the staff through bar boot camp to save it.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: A Bar Full of Bull : If Jon can't resurrect the menu and whip the staff into shape, then the coastal Massachusetts establishment Libads Bar & Grill will be lost at sea.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Two Flew Over The Handlebars : Sisters Betsy and Stephanie spend most of their time at work tossing back shots, and it's up to Jon to keep these two from running their biker bar into a ditch.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Twin vs. Twin : Jon must get identical twins with identical egos to see eye-to-eye if they are to curb a dangerous over-pouring problem and save RG's Lounge in Kansas City, MO.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Hostile Takeover : Jon looks to re-establish a sense of unity at O'Banion's in Nebraska, where a binge-drinking owner has been usurped in a hostile takeover by his partners.

programme.title: Bar Rescue

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Clampetts Play Cupid : After Ellie seems to be no longer interested in Dash Riprock Granny decides it's time to do a little matchmaking. She thinks the handsome actor would be perfect for Miss Jane.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Housekeeper : Mr. Drysdale talks the Clampetts into hiring a housekeeper. Unfortunately, the housekeeper that is hired is uninterested in doing housework.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Jethro In The Reserve : Col. Blake asks the actor playing Gen. Grant to play along with Granny so that the Civil War movie can continue. Meanwhile, Jethro uses his 6th grade education to take the written test to enter the Reserves.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Cimarron Drip : Jethro believes his moment for Hollywood stardom has arrived. Casting for Bachelor Sheriff Knows Best is occurring, and Jethro mistakenly thinks he has been chosen.
