programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Social Climbers : Granny's old friend, the widow Adaline Ashley, comes to Beverly Hills, and Granny sets to playing matchmaker for her and Jed. Mrs. Drysdale and her snooty friends are misled to believe Adaline is a socialite jet-setter.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Diner : Jethro decides to turn his favorite thing, eating, into a job by getting the family involved in buying a diner. The family's choice of offerings lead to a lack of customers, so Mr. Drysdale tries to fix things.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Topless Anyone : Jethro, worried that his diner the Hungry Gizzard has no customers, has a wonderful idea. He busts in on Mr. Drysdale trying to impress the wealthy Vanderpools, announcing the restaurant is going topless. Confusion ensues.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Great Snow : Granny wants to leave sunny California because she misses winter, sending Mr. Drysdale into a panic. The banker enlists Miss Jane in an elaborate scheme to convince the Clampetts that a blizzard has occurred.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Elly Comes Out : After reading the Society page, Granny decides the best way to get Elly a husband is to throw her a coming out party, complete with possum burgers and gopher gravy. Mrs. Drysdale, hoping to forever humiliate them, is all too happy to help.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: The Gypsy's Warning : The Clampketts come across Narda and Yerko, two gypsies, who decide to run a scam on the unsuspecting clan. Involving both a marriage prophecy and a curse, the crooks see the families' naivety to their advantage.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: His Royal Highness : The Clampetts are visited by a real king, Alexander, so Granny and Mrs. Drysdale start matchmaking. The broke royal needs a wealthy bride and courts Ellie. Drysdale niece Doreen is tricked by a costumed Jethro and ends up unimpressed.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Super Hawg : The Clampetts acquire a hippopotamus when an advertising scheme originated by banker Drysdale backfires.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: The Little Monster : Banker Milburn 'Drysdale's precocious 11-year-old nephew swindles the hillbillies of all the valuable art objects in their mansion.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Jed Inherits A Castle : Jed Clampett has inherited a castle in the English countryside. Jethro insists that everyone, except Granny, wear the royal raiment's of Elizabeth (the First, of course).

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Clampetts In London : The Clampetts head to England to visit the castle Jed inherited. Misunderstandings abound, from Jethro mistaking San Francisco for London, to the impounding of Granny's medical supplies, to the real intentions of the elderly chemist.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Clampett Castle : The Clampetts finally make it to their new castle and try to adjust to the English way of castle life, at the least the way Jethro thinks it is, based on his understanding of English myths and legends.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Greetings From The President : When Jethro gets his draft notice, Jed decides he should pay what it costs the Army to train inductees. When Mr. Drysdale hears this, he starts figuring how he can get Jethro out on a Section 8.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Army Game : Jethro reports to the induction center after getting his draft notice. The Army isn't quite sure what to make of Jethro.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Plot For Granny : Since Granny can't plant crops in their yard, Jed thinks the solution is to buy her a plot a land somewhere else. He figures a place called Happy Acres is the best spot to buy land, not realizing it's a cemetery.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Jethro's Military Career : Jethro thinks he wants to be a naval frogman, but Granny is concerned her tonic has transformed him. Mr. Drysdale, concerned about finances, has Miss Jane distract Jethro with comics, causing him to want to fly to the moon.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters
programme.desc: Knights of the Living Dead : On this episode of Ghost Hunters, TAPS travels to Worcester, Massachusetts to investigate the Higgins Armory, the only armory in the western hemisphere devoted to arms and armor.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters
programme.desc: A Soldier's Story : On this episode of Ghost Hunters, Tapsheads to Derby, Connecticut to investigate one of the country's oldest Opera houses, the Sterling Opera House.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters
programme.desc: Pearl Harbor Phantoms : For the first time ever, TAPS travels to Hawaii to explore one of America's most sacred settings, Pearl Harbor. They are joined in their investigation of the Pacific Aviation Museum by Destination Truth's Josh Gates.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters
programme.desc: Stage Fright : On this episode of Ghost Hunters, the team heads to Rapids Theater in Niagara Falls, New York where a lonely actress hanged herself backstage. The staff believes her spirit has never left and is haunting the theater.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters
programme.desc: Murdered Matron : Special guest investigator Meredith Vieira joins the TAPS team, as they investigate Sailors' Snug Harbor in Staten Island, New York. Once a retirement home to weathered seaman, it's now home to the spirit of a murdered matron.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters
programme.desc: The Bloodiest 47 Acres : TAPS is called out to Jefferson City, Missouri, to investigate the notorious Missouri State Penitentiary. A prison that was once named one of the most violent prisons in America.Riots, stabbings and executions left thousands dead over the years.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters
programme.desc: Voices of Pain : On this episode TAPS heads back to the fan favorite; Waverly Hills Sanatorium in Louisville, Kentucky, an abandoned tuberculosis hospital haunted by its former patients and staff.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters
programme.desc: Distillery of Spirits : On this episode of Ghost Hunters, TAPS heads to Buffalo Trace Distillery in Frankfort, Kentucky to investigate hauntings at the oldest operating distillery in America.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters
programme.desc: Membership Denied : TAPS is called out to Hartford, CT to Elks Lodge, the oldest and largest secret fraternal organizations in the country. Elks Lodge #19 is shrouded in mystery and tragedy with a gruesome death hanging over its head....and decades of paranormal activity.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters
programme.desc: Christmas Spirit : TAPS gets into the spirit with an investigation of Bethlehem, Pennsylvania.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters
programme.desc: Roller Ghoster : On this episode of Ghost Hunters,TAPS heads to Ohio to investigate Kings Island, anamusement park that sits on land that was thesite of an awful accident.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters
programme.desc: Buyer Beware : On this episode of Ghost Hunters, TAPS heads to Naples, New York, to investigate the Naples Hotel.This hotel was built in 1895.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters
programme.desc: Flooded Souls : On this episode of Ghost Hunters, TAPS heads to Hales Bar Dam and Marina in Tennessee, to investigate a dam that was built on Native American land.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters
programme.desc: Dead & Breakfast : On this episode of Ghost Hunters, TAPS investigates a 19thcentury Bed and Breakfast in Red Boiling Springs, Tennessee, built by the Cloyd family.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters
programme.desc: Moonshine & Madness : On this episode of Ghost Hunters: slavery, murder and madness are behind the hauntings at the notorious Graham Mansion. TAPS travels to Virginia to determine the true source of the claims that have taken place at this historical location.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters
programme.desc: City Hell : Onthis episode of Ghost Hunters, TAPS heads to Providence City Hall to investigate claims that a former mayor is hauntingthe building.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters
programme.desc: Frighternity : On this episode of Ghost Hunters, TAPS heads out to investigate the U.S. Naval Institute in Annapolis, Maryland, where a marine's death remains a mystery...and his ghost still roams the property.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters
programme.desc: A Ghost of a Marine : On this episode of Ghost Hunters, TAPS heads toMount Joy, Pennsylvania to help out the Great-Great Granddaughter of Alois Bube, the founder of Bube's Brewery.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters
programme.desc: A Family of Spirits : On this episode of Ghost Hunters, TAPS heads to Mt. Pleasant, South Carolina to help the USS Yorktown's crew figure out if the paranormal activity they are experiencing points to their fallen heroes.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters
programme.desc: Haunted By Heroes : For Grant's second to last case with Ghost Hunters, TAPS revisits one of Grant's favorite locations, Mt. Washington, in New Hampshire. Last time TAPS was here, they caught one of the best EVP's ever.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer

programme.title: Dog Whisperer

programme.desc: Terrance and Phillip: Behind the Blow : When the boys discover Terrance and Philip have called it quits, they'll go to any lengths to reunite the duo and recruit them for South Park's Earth Day festivities.

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: The New Terrance and Phillip Movie Trailer : All the kids in South Park are glued to the TV, wild with anticipation to see the first trailer for the latest Terrance and Phillip movie.

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: The Simpsons Already Did It : Professor Chaos is frustrated when he realizes all of his diabolical plans to wreak havoc on South Park have already been done by "The Simpsons."

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: It's Christmas in Canada : The Brovlofski family is dealt a devastating blow when Ike's Canadian birth parents show up unexpectedly. When the townspeople decide to forego Christmas gifts and take up a collection to get Ike home to South Park, the boys are distraught.

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: Canada On Strike : The head of the World Canadian Bureau leads the country into a long and painful strike and the responsibility of brokering a settlement rests with the boys.

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: Eat, Pray, Queef : Someone plays an April Fool’s joke on the boys and it doesn’t go over well.

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: Crème Fraiche : Randy’s obsession with the Food Network forces Sharon to explore a new interest of her own.

programme.title: South Park

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: Crack Baby Athletic Association : Kyle gets in on the ground floor of Cartman’s latest business venture, The Crack Baby Athletic Association.

programme.title: South Park

programme.title: South Park

programme.title: South Park

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: SUPER HARD PCness : It’s never been more challenging to be a PC Principal.

programme.title: South Park

programme.title: Star Trek: The Next Generation
programme.desc: First Contact : Commander William Riker has been on an acculturation mission under an alias for months on the Arkonian planet.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Galaxy's Child : While the Enterprise is in a star-base, Lt. Commander Geordi La Forge gets a very special visitor, brilliant engineering designer Dr. Leah Brahms, who he feels to know almost intimately as a 'hologram version' of herself with 'whom' he bonded.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Night Terrors : The Enterprise has finally tracked the missing starship USS Britain. Counselor Deanna Troi senses trouble with the life on board and joins Riker's boarding party.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Identity Crisis : Lt. Commander Geordi La Forge and an old friend fight to defeat a parasite that is trying to transform them into another species.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Next Generation
programme.desc: The Nth Degree : When assigned to investigate an unknown probe, Lt. Barclay is electrocuted through a shuttlecraft's computer, where he receives an unexplainable boost of confidence and a vast increase in his knowledge.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Qpid : The Enterprise is at Tegus 3, to host the Federation archaeologists council's annual symposium, where Picard is to give the key-note lecture on its enigmatic ruins, now forbidden to outsiders.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Next Generation

programme.title: Star Trek: The Next Generation

programme.title: Star Trek: The Next Generation

programme.title: Star Trek: The Next Generation

programme.title: Star Trek: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Darmok : The crew is rendered helpless when Picard is kidnapped and forced to go to war with an alien captain.

programme.title: Best of Dr. Phil
programme.desc: no info available

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Headline Horror Stories : With Nancy Grace, children's rights attorney Paul Mones & criminologist Dr. Denise Boots, Dr. Phil delves into the headlines: a starved & beaten teen escaping his torturers, an 8-year-old boy arrested for killing his father & two reporters found dead.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Money Saving Tips And Tricks : If you're in difficult economic times & looking for ways to save money, start taking notes! Dr. Phil's guests offer tips to help save on clothes, utilities & vacations. Learn how to cut your grocery bill in half & how to entertain family inexpensively.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Child Abductions : Child abductions are a reality, & friends, neighbors & even relatives can kidnap your youngster. Two victims share heart-wrenching stories of abduction & how they were returned to their families. Find out what you need to know to keep your child safe!

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: In Cold Blood Pt. 1 : A sleepy Indiana town awoke one winter morning in 1992 to news the lifeless body of 12-year-old Shanda Sharer was discovered in an open field. She had been stabbed, strangled, beaten, and burned alive. Who committed this vicious and heinous crime? Part 1

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Accused Of The Unthinkable Pt. 2 : Dr. Phil continues his work with a family ripped apart by accusations of child molestation. Father Jason agrees to take a polygraph test to prove his innocence. Tune in to find out the results and what's next for this family!

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Big-Time Moochers : Dr. Phil’s guests say they have a moocher in their midst, but they don’t know how to kick this freeloader to the curb! Karen and Rex say they’re tired of their 24-year-old twins, Andrew and Justin, living under their roof.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Dirt, Lies And The Internet : Dr. Phil investigates a popular new website that dishes the dirt on non-celebrities. On creator Nik Richie's controversial site, TheDirty.com, people anonymously submit photos & negative comments about anyone in their community, tabloid style.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Accused Of The Unthinkable Pt. 1 : In a gripping two-part series, Dr. Phil sits down with a family torn apart over accusations of the unthinkable. Melody says her 4-year-old granddaughter revealed that she was touched inappropriately by a man in a mask, and that the man was her daddy.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Ask Dr. Phil : Dr. Phil goes into his mailbag to answer viewers' popular questions! He has help from commedienne and author Teresa Strasser. When Teresa talks to moms on the street, find out their biggest parenting and pregnancy queries. Update on Ted Williams.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Bullies Beware Pt. 2 : The conversation heated when Dr. Phil gave self-professed bully Temica RoShawn a reality check about her aggressive behavior. Guests Ross & Lyndy say weeks of bullying culminated in their 15-yr-old son being sexually assaulted.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Parental Abductions Pt. 1 : Families are devastated when children go missing, but oftentimes it is a parental abduction. Fifteen years ago, John Clark came home from work to find his wife and three children gone, leaving only a cryptic note saying they went on vacation. Part 1

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Hands Off My Teen Daughter : Melanie says her 19-year-old daughter's boyfriend, Michael, is a drug-abusing gangbanger. What would cause her to have such a negative opinion of him? Learn why Michael initially agrees to a drug test, and then refuses. Will he break down and take it?

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Runaway Bride, Runaway Groom : Many women are itching to run to the altar, but Dr. Phil's guests say they are ready to run for the hills! Meet Kelly, who calls herself a runaway bride, and Chad, who says weddings are too expensive. Can Dr. Phil get them to commit?

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Consumed By Jealousy : Dr. Phil’s guests say the green-eyed monster has affected their marriage. Paula claims loyalty and Mike questions her fidelity. Mike placed listening devices in the home, set up surveillance cameras to follow her, and subjected Paula to polygraph tests.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Abducted By Their Mother Pt. 2 : It’s an emotional story that has captivated viewers for years. John Clark’s search for his three children abducted by their mother concludes when John received news that his children were found and living in London. John reunites with his children. Part 2

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Ask Dr. Phil : It's Ask Dr. Phil day. Is it an attractive woman's responsibility to tone down her looks on the job? Debrahlee made headlines saying she was fired for being too pretty. She says she was told her figure, pencil skirts & 3-inch heels were too distracting.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: The Ex Wars : Kristi said it was love at first sight when she met Michael. They married, had three kids, but when the union went awry nine years later, they divorced, and are now in an all-out war affecting the most vulnerable members of the family — the children.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: A Most Unusual Love Triangle : Tracey says her 23-year marriage is falling apart because husband Doug is having an affair with transgender female Essence. Tracey wants Doug to choose once and for all so that she can move on with her life. Why is she leaving the decision to him?

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Prophet Or Pedophile? Pt. 1 : Warren Jeffs, leader of the Fundamentalist Church of Jesus Christ of Latter Day Saints & self-proclaimed prophet, was on the FBI's 10 Most Wanted Fugitives for unlawful flight & sexual conduct with a minor. Dr. Phil talks with FLDS member Willie Jessop.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Love Triangle : Learning your spouse is a cheater is devastating, but how do you recover when his lover is also your best friend? This young couple was newlyweds when she found him in bed with her best friend and bridesmaid. He says he loves both--can Dr. Phil help?

programme.title: Best of Dr. Phil

programme.title: Love Island
programme.desc: The islanders are enjoying a once-in-a-lifetime summer in their very own sun-kissed paradise, facing all kinds of twists and turns. Whatever happens, one thing's for sure - you never know what's coming in the Love Island villa.

programme.title: Love Island
programme.desc: It's been another dramatic day as week four continues. The islanders are experiencing a summer they'll never forget, but the question remains, with a huge cash prize at stake for one couple, who's here for romance and who's just playing the game?

programme.title: Love Island
programme.desc: As another week on Love Island draws to a close, and we approach the end of the first month in paradise, the Islanders are more determined than ever to make it to the finish line. There are even more twists, turns and decisions to be made.

programme.title: Love Island
programme.desc: It's the beginning of week six of the island adventure and, with the finish line moving into view, the islanders are all dreaming of getting their hands on the massive £50,000 prize. However, nobody ever knows what's around the next corner.

programme.title: Love Island
programme.desc: The islanders are enjoying a summer they'll never forget, but as ever more twists and turns are coming their way. With the finish line inching ever closer, and that cash prize at stake, the boys and girls are desperate to make it all the way.

programme.title: Love Island
programme.desc: As week six continues the islanders are more determined than ever to make it all the way to the final day. With so much at stake, some are safely coupled, while others are in danger of being dumped from the Island.

programme.title: Love Island
programme.desc: It's week six in paradise, and with £50,000 pounds at stake, every one of the islanders will do whatever it takes to make it all the way to the finish line. However, with so much at stake, no one knows who can actually be trusted.

programme.title: Love Island
programme.desc: The twists and turns keep coming in the villa. And as the contest for the £50,000 prize heats up, the islanders face a dilemma. They might be friends, they might be lovers, but they're also in a fight to the finish that nobody wants to lose.

programme.title: Love Island
programme.desc: It's almost the end of another week and the temperature is rising once more in the nation's favourite villa. The finish line is moving ever closer but nobody wants to leave paradise. With a huge cash prize for a couple, the stakes couldn't be higher.

programme.title: Love Island
programme.desc: Unseen Bits : Week six in paradise is over and now is the perfect time to catch up with all the best moments. As ever, we've got all the biggest stories, plus an absolute feast of fantastic action nobody's seen before.

programme.title: Love Island
programme.desc: It's the start of week seven on `Love Island', and there are plenty more twists and turns to come for the islanders before one couple is given the chance to sail into the sunset with the 50,000-pound cash prize.

programme.title: Love Island
programme.desc: It's the penultimate week of `Love Island' and, as the summer of a lifetime builds to a thrilling climax, the islanders are pulling out all the stops in their bids to make it all the way to the finish line.

programme.title: Love Island
programme.desc: The clock is ticking on `Love Island' and the excitement is building by the minute. This time, the islanders face more twists and turns as they try to make it all the way to that final day in paradise.

programme.title: Love Island
programme.desc: The islanders are enjoying a summer none of them will ever forget, but they'd better be ready to fight all the way to the finish because only one couple will get the chance to win the 50,000-pound prize.

programme.title: Love Island
programme.desc: The excitement is building on `Love Island' and in the villa, the islanders are desperate to stay until the final day. As the clock counts down, the question is clearer than ever, who's here for love, and who's after the money?

programme.title: Love Island
programme.desc: It's almost the end of the penultimate week on `Love Island' and as the finish line moves into sight, the islanders are all desperate to make it there, but it won't be easy as the twists and turns keep on coming.

programme.title: Love Island
programme.desc: Unseen Bits : All the best moments from the past week, plus an absolute feast of unseen exclusives from the nation's favourite villa, all in one handy package.

programme.title: JAG
programme.desc: Into the Breech : Harm and Mac agree to help guide young student "attorneys" at Iron Forge Naval Academy, a prep school for the US Naval Academy, as they conduct a mock trial.

programme.title: JAG
programme.desc: Boomerang: Part II : Hostilities between Harm and Brumby escalate both in and out of the courtroom and it takes Chegwidden, with Brumby's CO's approval to get them to deal with their anger

programme.title: JAG
programme.desc: People V. Gunny : Gunny is charged with gay-bashing following an off duty altercation outside a gay bar.

programme.title: JAG
programme.desc: Mixed Messages : An intruder shoots three Navy people, killing two. One of the dead is a friend of Harm, who protects his reputation. Webb, counter-espionage, and disinformation are involved; Bud solves it. Mac and Renee return to town; Mac leaves again.

programme.title: JAG
programme.desc: Jag-a-thon : The JAG gang takes part in a JAGathon, a charity-benefit marathon, which provides opportunities for personal pride and individual competitiveness. Sturgis feels uncertain, and Harm defends a sailor for impersonating an officer.

programme.title: JAG
programme.desc: The Mission (Part I) : Harm and Mac go to sea during wartime operations. Harm flies the next mission, hits the target, and draws enemy fire; his aircraft sustains damage, but he safely returns. Bud runs into trouble at work, and Sturgis becomes closer to Bobbi.

programme.title: JAG
programme.desc: Defending His Honor : A Navy judge stands accused of vehicular homicide. Mac and Sturgis prosecute; Harm defends. Harm discovers the real cause of the wreck. Webb continues to pursue a terrorist, and Loren continues to promote trouble between Bud and Harriet.

programme.title: JAG
programme.desc: Enemy Below (Part II) : The clock is ticking down with every minute vital as the JAG team take the lead on the terrorist case.

programme.title: JAG
programme.desc: Critical Condition (Part III) : Bud has lost his right lower leg due to a mine in Afghanistan; during emergency surgery he faces bad trouble. Sturgis returns to Washington, and Harm and Mac disobey an order from the admiral. Bud encounters an astounding change of course.

programme.title: JAG
programme.desc: Killer Instinct : Louis Cellucci is having a rough time aboard the flight deck of the USS Benjamin Harrison. Moments after he walks away from another failed attempt at fixing an F-14, shouts of Man Overboard! are heard across the deck.

programme.title: JAG
programme.desc: To Walk on Wings : Congresswoman Latham and a colleague watch four marine jumpers jump into the ocean from an M22 Osprey. With two marines left to jump, the plane is struck by a swell in the ocean. Harm and Mac are instructed to investigate.

programme.title: JAG
programme.desc: Past Tense : Late one evening, Harm receives a message from his ex-girlfriend. Harm returns the call and is devastated to find out that Parker is dead. Eager to help, Harm immediately makes plans to meet with Agent Kenworthy who will be leading the NCIS investigation.

programme.title: JAG
programme.desc: Guilt : When Captain Huddleston hears that the marine corporal has been charged with rape, he sends Lt. Colonel Sarah Mac MacKenzie to handle the case in a hot zone of Anti-American activity.

programme.title: NCIS Los Angeles
programme.desc: Fool Me Twice : Callen and the team question Joelle's backstory after she escapes from a kidnapping and turns to Callen for help.

programme.title: NCIS Los Angeles
programme.desc: Forasteira : The team tracks a highly-skilled assailant determined to avenge her father's death by killing a Brazilian diplomat.

programme.title: NCIS Los Angeles
programme.desc: All is Bright : The team investigates a ransomware attack that disrupts the entire power grid and paralyzes the city; Sam struggles to find a way for his family to celebrate the holidays after his wife's death.

programme.title: NCIS Los Angeles
programme.desc: Where Everybody Knows Your Name : NCIS and FBI investigate the case of a Marine that is murdered by nerve gas. Later, Deeks shares his dream of opening a bar.

programme.title: NCIS Los Angeles
programme.desc: Venganza : NCIS investigates the murder of a federal prison inmate who was the adopted daughter of a notorious counterfeiter.

programme.title: NCIS Los Angeles
programme.desc: A Line In The Sand : Sam is shot during a firefight with the cartel; an interrogated suspect reveals new information on the whereabouts of Spencer Williams, the man who kidnapped Mosley's son.

programme.title: NCIS Los Angeles
programme.desc: Ninguna Salida : The NCIS team go all out to rescue a team member and kidnapped child in a daring mission on foreign soil.

programme.title: NCIS Los Angeles
programme.desc: To Live and Die in Mexico : Gravely injured and unable to communicate with the team in the U.S., Callen, Sam and Kensi, with an unconscious Deeks in tow, search for a safe way home

programme.title: NCIS Los Angeles
programme.desc: Superhuman : The prototype for a tactical assault suit is stolen from a Navy base and used in a Beverly Hills jewelry heist, so the team must determine who stole the suit and what their next target is.

programme.title: NCIS Los Angeles
programme.desc: The Prince : Callen and Sam are assigned protection duty for Deputy Crown Prince Kamal after an unknown assassin targets his decoy upon his arrival in Los Angeles.

programme.title: NCIS Los Angeles
programme.desc: Hit List : A cartel hit list includes pictures of the NCIS team, as well as Mosley and her son's names.

programme.title: NCIS Los Angeles
programme.desc: Pro Se : While assisting the team with an undercover operation, an informant is arrested; Callen meets with ATF Agent Anna Kolcheck, who remains on suspension following her last joint case with NCIS.

programme.title: NCIS Los Angeles
programme.desc: Asesinos : The team attempts to locate Mosley after she murders a cartel hit man and goes off the grid.

programme.title: NCIS Los Angeles
programme.desc: One of Us : The NCIS team partners with the State Department after the murder of an arms dealer is connected to a series of crimes seemingly executed by someone with elite special forces training.

programme.title: NCIS Los Angeles
programme.desc: The Patton Project : Deputy Director Ochoa volunteers the NCIS team to assist with a covert operation tied to a terrorist group advocating for extreme military force.

programme.title: NCIS Los Angeles
programme.desc: A Diamond in the Rough : The NCIS team investigates the home invasion of Navy Captain Dean Hadlow, who was entertaining his friend, General Omer Abidi of Pakistan, when robbers successfully stole money, jewelry and highly classified information.

programme.title: NCIS Los Angeles
programme.desc: Heist : An elaborate bank heist to steal a single safe deposit box held by Veronica Stephens, a Navy contractor, leads NCIS to investigate her corrupt consulting firm.

programme.title: NCIS Los Angeles
programme.desc: Joyride : The NCIS team is joined by NCIS Special Agent Nicole DeChamps after a Marine reservist with a history of PTSD disappears following a drunk and disorderly altercation.

programme.title: NCIS Los Angeles
programme.desc: The Sound of Silence : The chief of logistics for a naval weapons station collapses on the job, and the NCIS team must determine if it's a terror threat or a stress-induced breakdown.

programme.title: Married... With Children
programme.desc: Dead Men Don't Do Aerobics : A TV aerobics instructor tries to get the Bundys in shape, but instead, he becomes sedentary and dies of a heart attack after eating junk food.

programme.title: Married... With Children
programme.desc: Buck Saves the Day : Kelly and Bud need to raise money for concert tickets for themselves, so Bud sells Al as a camping guide, and Kelly cheats at a poker game with Peggy's friends.

programme.title: Married... With Children
programme.desc: Eatin' Out : The Bundy's go out to a fancy restaurant to spend an inheritance check for $237 from a late uncle of Peggy's. But it becomes apparent that the fine dining in public is not a part of the dysfunctional Bundy lifestyle.

programme.title: Married... With Children
programme.desc: Married…with Prom Queen: The Sequel - Pt 2 : Peggy stands to lose the crown to Connie Bender until Al finally decides to stand up to Connie's husband Jack. After Bud and Kelly crash the party, Peggy enlists their help to rig the election.

programme.title: Married... With Children
programme.desc: The Dateless Amigo : After his two best friends find dates for themselves, Bud desperately seeks any girl that will date him. Meanwhile, Al comes up with a million-dollar invention for a shoe salesmen's convention.

programme.title: Married... With Children
programme.desc: The Computer Show : The Bundys buy a computer, which serves no purpose other than a hat rack. But what nobody knows is that the computer can talk. But only to Al.

programme.title: Married... With Children
programme.desc: Life's a Beach : The Bundys spend a day at the beach.

programme.title: Married... With Children
programme.desc: Here's Lookin' at You, Kid : When a serial peeper is on the loose, Al makes the ultimate sacrifice to alleviate Peggy's despair about being the only one not fall victim. Bud must tutor Kelly so she can pass to the next grade.

programme.title: Married... With Children
programme.desc: Hot Off the Grill : On Labor Day, the gender roles are reversed when Al becomes the loafing one while he forces Peggy to prepare the backyard barbecue for his creation of the famous "Bundy Burgers."

programme.title: Married... With Children
programme.desc: Dead Men Don't Do Aerobics : A TV aerobics instructor tries to get the Bundys in shape, but instead, he becomes sedentary and dies of a heart attack after eating junk food.

programme.title: Married... With Children
programme.desc: Buck Saves the Day : Kelly and Bud need to raise money for concert tickets for themselves, so Bud sells Al as a camping guide, and Kelly cheats at a poker game with Peggy's friends.

programme.title: Married... With Children
programme.desc: Tooth or Consequences : A toothache forces Al to see Marcy's dentist, a divorced man who devotes as much of his time to his work as he does to his young female dental assistant. At the same time, Al pressures Peggy to cook him just one square meal.

programme.title: Married... With Children
programme.desc: He Ain't Much, But He's Mine : Peggy begins to suspect that Al is cheating because he seems to have a lot of different excuses on why he is coming home later than usual.

programme.title: Married... With Children
programme.desc: Fair Exchange : The Bundys' latest money-making scam is to host a foreign exchange student in their garage. But the French beauty proves to be so popular that she ends up stealing all of Kelly's boyfriends.

programme.title: Married... With Children
programme.desc: Desperately Seeking Miss October : When a Playboy playmate walks into Al's shoe store, he's eager to get home and look up her October 1987 issue. But Al is a broken man when he finds out that Peggy has sold his entire Playboy collection.

programme.title: Married... With Children
programme.desc: 976-SHOE : Al decides to open a shoe emergency hot-line with help from Steve in the form of a $50,000 loan.

programme.title: Married... With Children
programme.desc: Oh, What a Feeling : When the Dodge finally gives its death rattle, Al digs up his secret car-fund shoe box and trades the Dodge for a ride to the local dealership.

programme.title: Married... With Children
programme.desc: At the Zoo : Newly unemployed Steve decides he doesn't really want to work, so he fritters away his days with the Bundys, visiting zoos and taking fishing trips.

programme.title: Married... With Children
programme.desc: It's a Bundyful Life - Pt 1 : Al has finally saved up a lot of cash to buy his family a ton of presents they want this year. Unfortunately, a mob of late customers in the shoe store prevents him from getting to the bank and retrieving the money he needs.

programme.title: Married... With Children
programme.desc: It's a Bundyful Life - Pt 2 : His guardian angel decides to pay Al a visit and shows him what life is like without him born. The Jablonskys are a perfect family and The Rhoades are more like the Bundys except without Al.

programme.title: Married... With Children
programme.desc: Who'll Stop the Rain : Al desperately tries to fix the house's leaking roof during the weekend of a long rainstorm. But each time Al falls off the roof, it makes Peggy and the kids wonder if he's too stupid or too cheap to call a roofer to do the job.

programme.title: Married... With Children
programme.desc: A Taxing Problem : Al is faced with an IRS audit because of Peg. He decides to find money quick to pay off his taxes by selling Peg's hair for $5,000. However, Peg is not looking to give away her red anytime soon.

programme.title: Married... With Children
programme.desc: Rock and Roll Girl : When Al challenges the selfish and ungrateful family members to earn a dollar of their own, Peggy tries scamming money from others because of her loath for working. Meanwhile, Bud appoints himself as Kelly's agent lands her a job as a 'rock video slut'.

programme.title: Married... With Children
programme.desc: You Gotta Know When to Hold 'Em - Pt 1 : After Steve abandons Marcy, Peggy decides to make her feel better by going to Las Vegas with Al's money.

programme.title: Married... With Children
programme.desc: You Gotta Know When to Fold 'Em - Pt 2 : With Al and the kids discovering that Peggy took all the money, they go to Vegas where both Peggy and Marcy are broke and need a way to come up with money.

programme.title: Married... With Children
programme.desc: What Goes Around Comes Around : Al is all excited when he's asked to speak at his high school reunion dance at Polk High.

programme.title: Married... With Children

programme.title: Pluto Classic Movie Westerns
programme.desc: no info available

programme.title: In Old Monterey
programme.desc: Gene Autry tries to persuade farmers to sell their land for a military proving ground. Gene discovers that mine owners are stirring up the ranchers to con the government to pay more for their land.

programme.title: Billy Two Hats
programme.desc: Archie (Gregory Peck) and his partner, Billy (Desi Arnaz, Jr.) are bandits by trade, staging daring robberies throughout the American frontier. But when their latest heist takes a deadly turn, they are pursued by a ruthless marshal (Jack Warden).

programme.title: The Singing Hill
programme.desc: Gene Autry must stop a society girl from selling her ranch to a banker, upsetting the nearby ranchers. Gene has the girl declared incompetent with the help of a judge, to try to protect the ranch.

programme.title: Apache Country
programme.desc: Cavalry scouts Gene Autry & Pat Buttram are ordered to break up a ring which uses raids to cover up its activities. Carolina Cotton assists Gene and Pat, while seeking revenge against the gang leader.

programme.title: John Sturges' The Hallelujah Trail
programme.desc: Chaos reigns on the wide open plains as a host of stars, including Burt Lancaster and Lee Remick, have their eyes set on a shipment of whiskey and let loose in this wild comedy that spoofs nearly every convention of movie westerns.

programme.title: Return Of The Seven
programme.desc: Starring Yul Brynner and a stellar supporting cast that includes Robert Fuller, Warren Oates and Claude Akins, this classic western adventure follows the legendary Magnificent Seven as they thunder through Mexico to face the shootout of their lives!

programme.title: Last Of The Pony Riders
programme.desc: Gene Autry tries to set up a stage line to carry government mail. Schemers try to get the government assignment for their own stage line, and plan to discredit the Pony Express by causing accidents.

programme.title: Twilight On The Rio Grande
programme.desc: Gene Autry's investigation of the murder of his partner, leads him to Mexico, where he becomes involved with the beautiful singer whose father has also been killed, and finds a jewelry smuggling ring.

programme.title: Red River (1948)
programme.desc: John Wayne, Montgomery Clift and Walter Brennan give stellar performances in Howard Hawks' epic masterpiece as a self-made cattle baron (Wayne) and his adopted son (Clift) risk everything to drive their herd across the treacherous Chisholm Trail.

programme.title: Beyond The Purple Hills
programme.desc: Gene Autry becomes the new Sheriff after bank robbers kill the former sheriff. When Judge Beaumont is murdered, evidence points to the judge's wild son. Believing the young man, Gene tries to help.

programme.title: Sunset In Wyoming
programme.desc: Conscientious rancher Gene Autry must save his valley from flooding caused by a lumber company that is stripping the land. Gene hatches a plan to declare the mountain a state park and wildlife shrine.

programme.title: Hour Of The Gun
programme.desc: Director John Sturges presents a reworking of the Wyatt Earp/Doc Holliday legend and the struggle for political control of Tombstone, with a marvelous trio of antagonists: James Garner as Earp, Jason Robards as Holliday, and Robert Ryan as Clanton.

programme.title: The Conners
programme.desc: The Seperation of Church and Dan : Geena learns that D.J. hasn't been taking Mary to church while she's been away, so insists they go as a family to uphold her traditional values.

programme.title: The Conners
programme.desc: Miracles : A family member drops a life-changing announcement; Dan suspects that Becky isn't sticking to her end of the deal about her drinking; Darlene continues her job search; Jackie offers English lessons to a needful La Casita Bonita busboy.

programme.title: The Conners
programme.desc: One Flew Over The Conners' Nest : With Mark and Mary's help, Jackie convinces Dan to build a chicken coop in the backyard so the family can eat organic eggs, but from a bird's-eye view, it appears that she may have ulterior motives.

programme.title: The Conners
programme.desc: Pilot Lights & Sister Fights : Dan opens up to Louise; Darlene yearns for motherhood; Ben's responsibilities for Becky interfere with work.

programme.title: The Conners
programme.desc: CPAPs, Hickeys and Biscuits : Dan and Louise deepen their bond amid the challenges of aging; Darlene's night in jail leaves Ben in charge of parenting; Mark's class experiment with a friend results in hickeys.

programme.title: The Conners
programme.desc: Bridge Over Troubled Conners : Darlene and Ben hunt for apartments; Jackie, Becky, and Beverly Rose road trip to Mexico to meet her father; Dan confides financial woes to Louise.

programme.title: The Conners
programme.desc: Keep on Truckin' Six Feet Apart : The Conners are dealing with the pandemic and life's financial troubles; the Lunch Box is closed for everything but takeout and delivery.

programme.title: The Conners
programme.desc: Halloween and the Election vs. the Pandemic : Mary is devastated that Halloween has been canceled by the city, so Darlene and Becky enlist Jackie and the rest of the family to create an unforgettable experience.

programme.title: The Conners
programme.desc: Plastics, Trash Talk & Darlene Antoinette : Darlene isolates herself from her co-workers at Wellman Plastics, leaving them with the impression she is an elitist snob.

programme.title: The Conners
programme.desc: Birthdays, Babies and Emotional Support Chickens : It's Beverly Rose's first birthday -- but it's not all cake and candles -- when Becky and Emilio disagree on what kind of party they should have.

programme.title: The Conners
programme.desc: Friends in High Places and Horse Surgery : Darlene's friendship with a manager at Wellman Plastics lands her in an awkward situation; Louise's brother tries to win over Jackie.

programme.title: The Conners
programme.desc: Protest, Drug Test and One Leaves the Nest : Harris's job is in jeopardy after joining a protest she strongly believes in, leading to tense discussions within the family.

programme.title: The Conners
programme.desc: A Cold Mom, a Brother Daddy and a Prison Baby : Ben's mom arrives after an unexpected death and unveils shocking information from the past; Becky and Emilio spend more time together.

programme.title: The Conners
programme.desc: Young Love, Old Lions and Middle-Aged Hyenas : Harris brings home her new friend, Josh, leaving the family questioning his intentions; Becky and Ben's attempt to build a closet stirs up family drama.

programme.title: The Conners
programme.desc: Promotions, Podcasts and Magic Tea : Darlene earns a promotion at Wellman Plastics, while Ben decides on a new career path; Jackie tries an herbal tea. and it leads to an emotional revelation.

programme.title: The Conners
programme.desc: Who Are Bosses, Boats and Eckhart Tolle? : Chuck's new purchase of a boat creates a rift; Darlene hires her first assistant at Wellman's Plastics but soon realizes she is anything but helpful.

programme.title: The Conners
programme.desc: Panic Attacks, Hardware Store and Big Mouth Billy Bass : Darlene starts to feel the pressures of her new job; Dan attempts to help Ben out at the hardware store, but the two don't always agree on how to run the business.

programme.title: The Conners
programme.desc: A Stomach Ache, a Heartbreak and a Grave Mistake : Mark is convinced he has COVID-19; Becky and Harris team up to confront Josh, who has been 'ghosting' Harris.

programme.title: The Conners
programme.desc: Walden Pond, a Staycation and the Axis Powers : Dan feels helpless when Louise refuses to let him put himself at risk for her; when Jackie learns the competing restaurants are posting negative reviews.

programme.title: The Conners
programme.desc: Money, Booze and Lies : Becky meets up with an old friend and feels pressured to impress him; Dan questions his position at the hardware store, leading to a massive fight between him and Ben.

programme.title: The Conners
programme.desc: An Old Dog, New Tricks and a Ticket to Ride : Becky is working double shifts and taking classes at the community college, resulting in less time with her daughter; Dan decides to foster an elderly dog.

programme.title: The Conners
programme.desc: A Fast Car, a Sudden Loss and a Slow Decline : Darlene learns some shocking news about an old friend; the Conners family comes together to help someone close to them.

programme.title: The Conners
programme.desc: Regrets, Rehabs and Realtors : Dan encounters a surprise visitor who shares some unsolicited advice, leaving him feeling guilty; Darlene welcomes a new employee to Wellman Plastics.

programme.title: The Conners
programme.desc: Cheating, Revelations and a Box of Doll Heads : Mark is stressed and exhausted from studying for an important entrance exam, so Darlene steps in to help, but her plan backfires.

programme.title: The Conners
programme.desc: Jeoparde, Sobriete, and Infidelite : Darlene makes a decision about her trip to Hawaii, leading to a heated encounter with Barb; Becky gives a presentation on addiction to Mark's class.

programme.title: The Conners
programme.desc: Two Proposals, a Homecoming and a Bear : Two proposals bring big changes to the Conner family; Jackie uses her Jeopardy infamy to her advantage.

programme.title: The Conners
programme.desc: Trucking Live in Front of a Fully Vaccinated Studio Audience : The Conners continue to deal with the pandemic while navigating breakups and newfound sobriety, all while planning an upcoming wedding.

programme.title: The Conners
programme.desc: Education, Corruption and Damnation : After Ben declines Darlene's proposal, she starts to ponder why she tends to be so negative in life, prompting her to start a journey of self-discovery, which leads to Pastor Phil.

programme.title: The Conners
programme.desc: Sober Sex, Plastic Silverware and Losing My Religion : Part of Becky's recovery program mandates she make amends with people she has lied to over the years, leading her to meet up again with a former high school friend; Darlene visits with Pastor Phil; Louise continues planning her wedding.

programme.title: The Conners
programme.desc: The Wedding of Dan and Louise : It's Dan and Louise's wedding day, but it's a far-from-perfect walk down the aisle, especially when a weather report forecasts that a tornado is headed for Lanford creating chaos and surprises.

programme.title: The Conners
programme.desc: Peter Pan, The Backup Plan, Adventures in Babysitting and A River Runs Through It : The Conner home is decked out for Halloween, despite the leak in the roof that forces Dan and Louise to cancel their honeymoon; Becky surprises the newlyweds and takes them on a virtual adventure around the world.

programme.title: The Conners
programme.desc: Young Love, Old Love and Take This Job and Shove It : Darlene worries about Mark making friends at his new school; Mark turns to Ben for personal advice; Becky finds herself thriving in college and starts thinking about her future plans.

programme.title: The Conners
programme.desc: Let's All Push Our Hands Together For the Stew Train and The Conners Furniture : Jackie devises an offbeat plan to serve the customers at The Lunch Box, it's anything but smooth; Dan begins to sell furniture to make room for his new bride and her things.

programme.title: The Conners
programme.desc: Yard Sale, Phone Fail and a College Betrayal : As Louise starts to move into the Conner home, Dan decides to sell the furniture set he bought for Roseanne when they were first married; he soon finds parting with the furniture harder than he thought it would be.

programme.title: The Conners
programme.desc: Three Exes, Role Playing and a Waterbed : Darlene brings Nick to the hardware store, where they run into Ben, who invites Nick to join him at The Lunch Box to watch a Bears game.

programme.title: Pokemon: The Johto Journeys
programme.desc: Fighting Flyer With Fire : It’s finally time for Ash’s first Johto League Gym battle, and he’s feeling confident. But Falkner’s Flying-type Pokémon prove to be tough competition! Can Ash take the win—and his first Gym badge?

programme.title: Pokemon: The Johto Journeys
programme.desc: For Crying Out Loud : Back on the road after his first Johto Gym badge win, Ash and the gang find a cute Marill that won’t stop crying! Nothing our heroes try will stop it, and a Team Rocket raid certainly won’t help!

programme.title: Pokemon: The Johto Journeys
programme.desc: Tanks A Lot! : Team Rocket’s latest invention is bound to be a hit...until Togepi and its newfound Sentret friend take it out for a spin!

programme.title: Pokemon: The Johto Journeys
programme.desc: Love, Totodile Style : Ash’s Totodile develops a crush on a passing Azumarill, the star performer of a Pokémon circus. When Team Rocket arrives to steal the show, Azumarill’s heart isn't the only thing Totodile has to win!

programme.title: Pokemon: The Johto Journeys
programme.desc: Fowl Play : Ash has his sights set on a rare Noctowl with unusual coloring, but this clever Pokémon repeatedly uses Hypnosis to get the better of him! Will Ash be able to catch this Noctowl napping?

programme.title: Pokemon: The Johto Journeys
programme.desc: Forrest Grumps : A surprise attack from a group of Ursaring has our heroes and Team Rocket running for cover. In the chaos, the groups are split up, and the unenthusiastic pairings are forced to work together. But for how long?

programme.title: Pokemon: The Johto Journeys
programme.desc: The Psychic Sidekicks : After seeing a sign in the forest warning them about mischievous Ghost-type Pokémon, our heroes reach a town whose residents use Psychic types to repel them. But soon some spooky news arrives: a giant Gengar is on the loose!

programme.title: Pokemon: The Johto Journeys
programme.desc: The Fortune Hunters : A sudden craze in Pokémon fortune-telling turns out to be a plot to steal Pokémon from local Trainers. But Jessie, James and Meowth aren't behind it this time! Who are these con artists?

programme.title: Pokemon: Johto League Champions
programme.desc: A Goldenrod Opportunity : Arriving in Goldenrod City, Ash is ready for his next Gym battle, but the Gym appears to be closed. Their plans delayed, our heroes decide to explore the vibrant city.

programme.title: Pokemon: Johto League Champions
programme.desc: A Dairy Tale Ending : After losing to Whitney at the Goldenrod Gym, Ash is thinking of a rematch with her powerful Miltank. When Whitney suggests a trip to a Miltank dairy, it’s just the chance he's is looking for!

programme.title: Pokemon: Johto League Champions
programme.desc: Air Time : With his new Gym badge in hand, Ash is asked to appear on a local radio station. But while he's acting out a radio drama with some 'professional actors,' the scripted danger becomes all too lifelike!

programme.title: Pokemon: Johto League Champions
programme.desc: The Bug Stops Here : A Bug Pokémon Catching Contest turns into a hive of activity when Ash goes up against his rival Casey—and it isn’t long before the Team Rocket villains swarm the scene, intent on catching a few things for themselves…

programme.title: Pokemon: Johto League Champions
programme.desc: Type Casting! : On the way to Ecruteak City, our heroes are trapped on the wrong side of a river. To get across, they first have to find a Sudowoodo...which, even for an expert, is no easy feat!

programme.title: Pokemon: Johto League Champions
programme.desc: Fossil Fools : When an ex-student of Professor Oak’s discovers some restored Omanyte and Omastar in the wild, our heroes are called into action to save these prehistoric Pokémon from harsh times with Team Rocket!

programme.title: Pokemon: Johto League Champions
programme.desc: Carrying On : The Pidgey Express courier service is in need of our heroes' helping hands, especially when Team Rocket wants to have the delivery Pidgey signed, sealed, and delivered to the Boss!

programme.title: Pokemon: Johto League Champions
programme.desc: Hassle In The Castle : Caught in a sudden downpour, our heroes find a castle clinic that uses Pokémon healers to help patients. But when Brock and the doctor end up trapped in the castle's labyrinth, a helping hand is needed to get them out!

programme.title: Pokemon: Johto League Champions
programme.desc: Two Hits And A Miss : After meeting the elderly owner of a Pokémon dojo, Ash is called upon to replace the man's granddaughter as the chosen heir! But when a vicious challenger approaches, can Ash help defend the dojo from destruction?

programme.title: Pokemon: Johto League Champions
programme.desc: A Hot Water Battle : Chikorita, Cyndaquil, and Totodile find themselves separated from the group and stuck in a ravine! When Meowth finds himself stuck too, an unlikely partnership forms!

programme.title: Pokemon: Johto League Champions
programme.desc: Hook, Line And Stinker : Misty is reeled into a rivalry at a local Seaking fishing competition. Can she come out on top?

programme.title: Pokemon: Johto League Champions
programme.desc: Beauty And The Breeder : A Pokémon breeding contest gives our heroes a chance to compete, greet an old friend, and defeat Team Rocket once again!

programme.title: Pokemon: Johto League Champions
programme.desc: A Better Pill To Swallow : When Ash comes down with a serious stomachache far from any hospital, a local healer and his Shuckle companions are on task to set him right!

programme.title: Pokemon: Johto League Champions
programme.desc: Power Play : A run-in with his longtime rival Gary leaves Ash in a bad mood. But when Team Rocket’s latest weapon starts terrorizing the local Pokémon Center, Ash might have to turn to him for help!

programme.title: Pokemon: Johto League Champions
programme.desc: Mountain Time : After our heroes meet a mountain patrol and their Ledian partners, they'll have to help protect the mountain from a destructive Team Rocket attack!

programme.title: Pokemon: Johto League Champions
programme.desc: Wobbu-Palooza : The peace and quiet of a Wobbuffet festival is interrupted by some hooligans picking a fight. Pokémon battles are banned during the festival, so how can our heroes defend the town?

programme.title: Pokemon: Johto League Champions
programme.desc: Imitation Confrontation : Ash and the gang are happy to see Duplica again...but not as happy as the Team Rocket trio, when they discover her newest Ditto’s tiny transformations!

programme.title: Pokemon: Johto League Champions
programme.desc: The Trouble With Snubbull : A Snubbull falls into a Team Rocket trap, and the villains try to ransom it back to its wealthy Trainer. But when the Pokémon fights back, Jessie, James, and Meowth might be the ones in trouble!

programme.title: Pokemon: Johto League Champions
programme.desc: Ariados, Amigos : On their way to Ecruteak City, our heroes must help a familiar Trainer and her Ariados defend a martial arts center from a rampaging Team Rocket!

programme.title: Pokemon: Johto League Champions
programme.desc: Wings ‘N’ Things : When a young Trainer’s Yanma accidentally destroys his father’s precious glasswork, it inspires a Team Rocket scheme that will shatter the peace and quiet of the town!

programme.title: Pokemon: Johto League Champions
programme.desc: The Grass Route : Hearing of a nearby Grass-type Pokémon tournament, Ash decides to enter...and a rivalry soon begins to bloom amid the heat of battle!

programme.title: Pokemon: Johto League Champions
programme.desc: The Apple Corp! : Pikachu’s in trouble when an orchard owner mistakes it for one of the hungry Pichu that have ransacked her harvests. Ash wants to help, but will the fruits of his labor satisfy both the orchard owner and the Pokémon?

programme.title: Pokemon: Johto League Champions
programme.desc: Houndoom’s Special Delivery : When the smoke clears after their latest run-in with Team Rocket, our heroes quickly realize that Togepi is missing! As they begin the search, Togepi has started making friends in another part of the forest.

programme.title: Pokemon: Johto League Champions
programme.desc: A Ghost Of A Chance (Title Changed After 9/11) : Finally reaching Ecruteak City, our heroes set out to find the Gym, but wind up inside a decaying tower instead. Suddenly, the tower bursts into flames with our heroes trapped inside! How can they escape?

programme.title: Pokemon: Johto League Champions
programme.desc: From Ghost To Ghost : It is finally time for Ash’s fourth Gym battle! After seeing Morty’s powerful Gengar in action, Ash is under no illusions about how tough these Ghost-type Pokémon will be! Can he claim the Fog Badge?

programme.title: Pokemon: Johto League Champions
programme.desc: Trouble’s Brewing : When our heroes meet five beautiful sisters in a cultural garden, they are soon challenged to a series of testing battles involving Eevee and some of its evolved forms!

programme.title: Untold Stories of the E.R.
programme.desc: The Big Save : An anesthesiologist has a heart attack; a pregnant woman has a cerebral aneurysm; doctors are sprayed with blood from a man who was stabbed in the heart; a prostitute's unusual hiding place for money is found.

programme.title: Untold Stories of the E.R.
programme.desc: My Job Is Mayhem : A man injured in a medieval roleplaying battle has a sword impaled in his head; a critically ill patient is so afraid of germs he won't allow doctors to treat him; two patients with the same life-threatening symptoms arrive separately from a fashion show.

programme.title: Untold Stories of the E.R.
programme.desc: We Have A Heartbeat : A carjacker has shot a policewoman in the chest. A homeless woman has cellulitis. A drug dealer is unresponsive after having been beaten. Two middle-aged men with severe burns. A man in his 70s has been found unresponsive in a public place.

programme.title: Counting Cars
programme.desc: Sailor's Soul : Representatives from Sailor Jerry enlist the shop's help to build a bike to commemorate the late artist's iconic style and to auction it off at an upcoming charity fundraiser.

programme.title: Counting Cars
programme.desc: The Cart of War : When Danny blows a gasket upon seeing his beloved golf cart covered in dirt, grime and Horny Mike's weird stuff, Kevin launches a plan to make Danny happy, and teach Mike a lesson.

programme.title: Counting Cars
programme.desc: Superfine Econoline : Danny makes an old Ford Econoline look so cool that in the end, two buyers get into a bidding war for it. Meanwhile, Mike and Roli find a BMW motorcycle with a lot of history.

programme.title: Counting Cars
programme.desc: Chevy Truck Tribute : A family brings in an old pickup truck to be restored in memory of their mom, and Danny needs to figure out how to build the perfect tribute vehicle, without blowing the budget.

programme.title: Counting Cars
programme.desc: Mangled Mustang Part 1 : Danny gets hired to do a full bumper-to-bumper restoration on a '66 Mustang Convertible. Unfortunately, when the car is stripped down, they find there's not a whole lot of car between her bumpers.

programme.title: Counting Cars
programme.desc: Mangled Mustang Part 2 : Danny and the team continue wrestling with the stock restoration Mustang mess, hoping for some extra funds and a lot of patience from their client. Meanwhile, Kevin spots a rare old Grand Prix.

programme.title: Counting Cars
programme.desc: Tricked Out Triumph Part 1 : Danny and the team are commissioned to restore a 1941 Triumph motorcycle back to its WWII era glory. Even with a $50,000 budget, it turns into one of the biggest challenges in Count's Kustoms history.

programme.title: Counting Cars
programme.desc: Tricked Out Triumph Part 2 : Danny continues working on a WWII era Triumph motorcycle for a client hoping to have it as a tribute to his family's military roots. When they get it all together and try to crank it, it won't start.

programme.title: Counting Cars
programme.desc: Big Money Bike : Danny builds a world-class bike for a high end client, and if all goes well it could mean a ton of new business for the shop. Meanwhile, Mike and Ryan are on the hunt for the perfect Mustang.

programme.title: Counting Cars
programme.desc: 68 Killer Camaro : A high end client has his heart set on a tricked out '68 Camaro, so Danny sets out to find one and give it the world class Counts Kustoms treatment. Kevin spots a 1969 AMX that Danny has always wanted.

programme.title: Counting Cars
programme.desc: Crazy Cool Cadillac : Ryan reluctantly goes down the Caddy customization wormhole on a personal project, and everyone at the shop is happy to watch him go, just to see how great it turns out.

programme.title: Counting Cars
programme.desc: Better Late than Never : Shannon recruits the guys to help him finish up a gift for Danny - a bike he started building for him ten years ago. Danny spots a 1969 Corvette in a friend's lot and he can't resist paying a visit.

programme.title: FantomWorks
programme.desc: A Bumpy Ride : Bill needs Dan to tame a 1969 Pontiac Firebird that was set-up for just one thing – speed. Tim’s 1974 International Harvester Scout was given a paint job that took 4 years. He hopes that Dan can somehow pick up the pieces. Literally.

programme.title: FantomWorks
programme.desc: Mismatching Numbers : Steve has only driven his prized 1969 Camaro Z28 at five miles an hour, but he wants it to be a muscle car beast. Scott owns a rare matching numbers 1964 Corvette that he wants brought back to life.

programme.title: FantomWorks
programme.desc: Another Bricklin The Wall : Walter loves the fast and futuristic look of his 1975 Bricklin. Unfortunately, the car drives like something from the dark ages. Dan restores a 1963 Split Window Corvette for a pair of owners who know him well – his Uncle Carl and Aunt Claire.

programme.title: FantomWorks
programme.desc: Tri Power Trials : Charles wants Dan to find him a 1967 Corvette with a set-up that’s rare as hen’s teeth. Bob’s 1973 Cuda has been stored for most of its life – but even in storage time takes a heavy toll.

programme.title: FantomWorks
programme.desc: Snake Bite : FantomWorks dull the fangs on a 1965 Shelby Cobra kit car and bring a 1964 Dodge Dart back on target.

programme.title: FantomWorks
programme.desc: Chevy Shock : Patsy and Apryle bring their 1968 Corvette in for mechanical work, but what their car really needs is a new paint job. Jim’s 1958 Impala is an auction car. It looks pretty but when it’s time to drive – it’s half the car Jim was hoping for.

programme.title: FantomWorks
programme.desc: Flathead 'Til I'm Dead : Chris wants the 1950 F1 Truck he remembers from high school and Dean wants the 1968 Lincoln Continental he drove with his dad.

programme.title: FantomWorks
programme.desc: Kit Car Chaos : Bob spent years working on his beloved 1969 K20 Truck, but he needs FantomWorks to solve the mysteries within. Dan’s brother-in-law John shows up with a 1962 Ferrari kit car that looks hot, but the wiring could burn it to the ground.

programme.title: FantomWorks
programme.desc: Busted Knuckle : Kim and Doug want to drive her father’s hyper-rare 1959 Thunderbolt, but the car was only set up for the racetrack. Batalla is a legendary motorcycle builder who asks Dan to restore his prized possession - a 1947 Knucklehead.

programme.title: FantomWorks
programme.desc: Easier Said : Larry wants to drive his1959 Cadillac DeVille, but the car has spent decades baking in the Arizona sun. Brian spent years gathering parts to restore his grandfather’s 1960 Bel Air only to find that he’s missing more critical components than he’s found…

programme.desc: Everything You Need To Know About Conifers : Martha shows how to properly move an established tree on her very own Christmas tree farm; she gives a tour of her pinetum where she teaches about new and unusual conifer trees.

programme.title: Martha Gardens
programme.desc: Amazing Houseplants : Martha brings the outdoors inside the home and shares her love of houseplants; she shows how to take care of the most popular houseplants and how to propagate them to create new plants.

programme.title: Martha Cooks
programme.desc: Japanese Knife Skills : Martha takes a deep dive into how to choose and maintain the best knives; Chef Masa Takayama shares his superior knife skills and world renowned dishes.

programme.title: Martha Cooks
programme.desc: Arethusa Farm Dairy's Award Winning Cheese : Martha road trips to Arethusa Farm in Bantam, CT, and learns how they make their award-winning Europa cheese, visits their cheese caves, and makes their delicious cheesy risotto recipe.

programme.title: Martha Cooks
programme.desc: French Bistro Night : Martha gets a first-hand look behind the delicious French dishes at Cenadou Bistrot including mussels in a tomato sauce with housemade croutons and a flatbread topped with olives and anchovies.

programme.title: Martha Cooks
programme.desc: The Perfect Jams to Pair With a Simple Breakfast : One of Martha's favorite things to do is to make jam with the perfectly ripened fruit and berries grown on her Bedford farm; Martha shares her favorite recipes, as well as jam and jarring techniques.

programme.title: Martha Gardens
programme.desc: Inside Martha's Vegetable Greenhouse; Seed Starting : Martha takes us inside her vegetable greenhouse to see how she has turned her harvest into a year-round bounty; she collects, stores, and sows seeds, and makes her perfect green drink.

programme.title: Martha Gardens
programme.desc: The Incredible World of Orchids : Martha visits the incredible Orchid Show at the New York Botanical Garden; this year's show immerses you in a mesmerizing array of orchids designed by acclaimed artist Lily Kwong.

programme.title: Martha Gardens
programme.desc: Hens and Chicks : Now with over 200 chickens and 20 different breeds, Martha shares her vast knowledge about raising and caring for her flock; learn the how-tos of building a coop.

programme.title: Martha Gardens
programme.desc: Martha Builds a Raised Bed Vegetable Garden : Martha builds a brand new, half-acre raised bed vegetable garden on her farm! It's a step-by-step guide to designing, building, preparing the soil, and planting.

programme.title: Martha Gardens
programme.desc: Everything's Coming Up Roses : Everything is coming up roses on Martha's Bedford farm; Martha is creating a brand new rose garden with almost 200 roses; from color to fragrance, the inspired world of roses is a very good thing.

programme.title: Martha Gardens
programme.desc: Azaleas, Hostas, and Wild Birds : Martha's azalea grove is bursting with the last flowers of spring; then everything you need to know about hostas; Martha takes up bird watching.

programme.title: Martha Gardens
programme.desc: Martha's Garden Tours of Turkey Hill and Bedford : Martha visits her former home, Turkey Hill, where everything began for Martha in the 1970s; then back to her Bedford farm for a garden club tour - a peek inside Martha's gardens past and present.

programme.title: Martha Gardens
programme.desc: Color For All Seasons : One of the joys of gardening is planning for beautiful color all through the year; bulbs and tubers are at the center of this show because of their beautiful blooms from spring to winter.

programme.title: Martha Stewart's Cooking School
programme.desc: Turkey : Traditional turkey; roasting turkey in parchment paper; braising turkey legs; roasted rolled turkey breast with herbs.

programme.title: Martha Stewart's Cooking School
programme.desc: French Bistro Classics : Lamb navarin; nicoise salad; a melted ham and cheese croque monsieur topped with a bechamel sauce; celery root remoulade.

programme.title: Martha Stewart's Cooking School
programme.desc: Cooking With Wine : Beef bourguignon; cioppino, a tomato and wine-based fish stew; chicken marsala; poached pears in red or white wine.

programme.title: Martha Stewart's Cooking School
programme.desc: Italian Favorites : Eight-layer pork ragu; bechamel-filled lasagna baked in ramekins; chicken parmesan; raviolo with an egg yolk and ricotta-spinach filling; linguine with clam sauce.

programme.title: Martha Stewart's Cooking School
programme.desc: On the Bone : Oxtail; slow-roasted beef ribs; cowboy steak; Korean short rib kebabs.

programme.title: Martha Stewart's Cooking School
programme.desc: Lamb : Butterflied, rolled and roasted leg of lamb; lamb tagine with spiced butternut squash and prunes; yogurt-marinated lamb kebabs; seared loin lamb chops served with mint jelly and fried fingerling potatoes.

programme.title: Martha Stewart's Cooking School
programme.desc: Arabian Gulf Breakfast : Khameer, a date-sweetened bread; shakshouka, a baked egg dish; jebabs; balaleet.

programme.title: Martha Bakes
programme.desc: Embellished Pies : A woven blueberry lattice pie; a petal-topped poached pear and cranberry pie; a pie featuring a unique hot water crust.

programme.title: Martha Bakes
programme.desc: Cultured Dairy : How buttermilk, yogurt and sour cream are made; plum and creme fraiche pie; pistachio-rhubarb yogurt cake.

programme.title: Martha Bakes
programme.desc: Ginger : Ginger-pear hand pies; molasses-ginger crisps.

programme.title: Martha Bakes
programme.desc: Cocoa : Amy Guittard of Guittard Chocolate Co. discusses cocoa; black bread with cocoa and coffee; chocolate charlotte.

programme.title: Martha Bakes
programme.desc: Grapes : The different varieties of grapes; winemaker's focaccia; Concord grape tart.

programme.desc: Kikyo's Stolen Ashes : The ogress, Urasue, robs the grave of Kikyo, the priestess who sealed away Inuyasha fifty years ago.

programme.title: Inuyasha
programme.desc: Return of the Tragic Priestess, Kikyo : Kikyo is revived when Kagome's soul flows into her. She tries to kill Inuyasha, but Kagome takes back her soul.

programme.title: Inuyasha
programme.desc: Mystical Hand of the Amorous Monk, Miroku : Miroku, a womanizing delinquent priest, has been collecting Shikon Jewel shards and steals Kagome's shards.

programme.title: Inuyasha
programme.desc: The Cursed Ink of the Hell-Painter : Kotatsu, a painter, sees a dream in which he becomes successful by controlling an army of ogres drawn with ink that has a sacred jewel shard in it.

programme.title: Inuyasha
programme.desc: Naraku and Sesshomaru Join Forces : Naraku appears before Sesshomaru and lends him an arm with a sacred jewel shard embedded in it.

programme.title: Inuyasha
programme.desc: Go Back to Your Own Time, Kagome! : Sesshomaru wields the Tetsusaiga with his borrowed arm against Inuyasha, who fights back with his scabbard.

programme.title: Inuyasha
programme.desc: Despicable Villain! The Mystery of Onigumo! : Kagome has her sacred jewel shards taken away from her and is returned to the present day, unable to return to feudal Japan.

programme.title: Inuyasha
programme.desc: Naraku's True Identity Unveiled : Kagome returns to the shrine in the middle of her date with Hojo. She senses the presence of the Shikon Jewel shards and returns to feudal Japan.

programme.title: Inuyasha
programme.desc: A Wicked Smile; Kikyo's Wandering Soul : Kikyo, who was brought back to life, is living as a priestess.

programme.title: Inuyasha
programme.desc: Kagome's Voice and Kikyo's Kiss : Kikyo paralyzes Kagome. Inuyasha appears before her. Kikyo has been gathering the souls of dead girls.

programme.title: Inuyasha
programme.desc: Enter Sango, the Demon Slayer : Sango, a demon slayer, is invited to Hitomi Castle along with her father, the leader of the demon slayers, and her younger brother, Kohaku.

programme.title: Inuyasha
programme.desc: Naraku’s Insidious Plot : Sango fights Inuyasha, believing him to be her enemy. Naraku's plan is to have her fight to the death using the power of the Shikon Jewel shard.

programme.title: Inuyasha
programme.desc: The Secret of the Sacred Jewel Revealed! : Sango reveals the secret story of the Shikon Jewel's birth.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: no info available

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Lyon, France : Tony accompanies world-renowned chef and restaurateur Daniel Boulud as they travel back to Daniel’s hometown of Lyon, France for a pilgrimage of the city’s rich food culture and its legendary chefs.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Mexico City : Tony travels to Mexico City and Oaxaca to meet who fight for the food, the art, and the lives they believe in. In the Santa Anita neighbourhood of Mexico City, Tony meets boxer Jorge Lacierva.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Salvador, Brazil : Tony heads back to his much-beloved Salvador, Brazil. The ever-present street festivals and the famous Carnival parade begin with sitting down with a local artist in the streets of the historic Pelo.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Jamaica : In this episode Tony travels to the lesser-known, North Eastern Coast of Jamaica. White sandy beaches and a cool breeze with a tropical umbrella drink in hand is usually the perception of island life.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Scotland : In this episode of Parts Unknown, we first visit the city of Glasgow, then we head north into the Scottish Highlands.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: South Korea : After eight years, Tony returns to South Korea. And this time, he’s no stranger to kimchi. But just as Tony has changed, so has Korea.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Miami : In this episode of Parts Unknown Tony explores a few of the many faces of Miami. Chef Michelle Bernstein takes Tony out to an authentic Cuban breakfast and a late-night dinner at a gas station café in Doral.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Madagascar : In this episode of Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown, Tony travels to Madagascar, a place that outsiders understand surprisingly little about.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Budapest : For the first time, Tony visits Budapest, 25 years after democracy planted its flag –alongside the Oscar-winning master of light, cinematographer Vilmos Zsigmond, as one of his key guides.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: New Jersey : In this episode of Parts Unknown Tony travels back to his homeland, his roots, his favorite state in the union: New Jersey. Part nostalgia, part cautionary tale. Tony makes sure to hit up some NJ classics.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Hawaii : Tony explores the other Hawaii, the one that those eight million tourists don’t see when they come to the islands. He discovers the fabric of a true cultural mixing pot.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Beirut : The first time Tony visited Beirut, it didn't end well. Now Tony is back in Beirut, where all the world’s troubles and all the world's good comes together to form a city like no other.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Burma : With the slight relaxation of control by the government of Myanmar, Tony is finally able to explore one of the most fabled and beautiful areas of Asia.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Los Angeles : Roy Choi’s food reflects a new American idea of "natural" fusion. Bourdain examines the meeting point of Asian, Mexican, Latino culture in modern LA.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Colombia : Tony will explore several regions of Colombia from the mountains down to the Caribbean coast to the coca leaf growing inlands formerly controlled by drug cartels.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Libya : Libyan hip-hop, Italian restaurants, tribal allegiances and post-war uncertainty in Libya. Bourdain looks at the country through personal stories, food, and the music of anti-Qaddafi rapper expats.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Canada : The two funniest and most brilliant chef/restaurateurs in Canada, Joe Beef's Dave McMillan and Fred Morin, take Tony across Canada by rail.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Tangier : Tony explores what Burroughs called "Interzone," where artists sought escape from Western moral prohibitions and the possibilities of great empty spaces. But what is it like now?

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Peru : Tony and his friend, world-renowned chef Eric Ripert, explore the far reaches of indigenous Andes in search of a rare variety of wild cocoa that is said to be the "best" in the world.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Congo : Bourdain looks at the Congo as one of the more industrialized powers in Africa now largely crumbled to nothingness and chaos with Tim Butcher author of Blood River.
